## AMPLIFICATION-STABILITY LEVER FOR F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) — RESULT (session 2026-07-08, angle: literature-fundamental-group-qgaussian)

TARGET (prompt item B, previously "unattempted"): prove F(Gamma_q(H_inf))=R_+ DIRECTLY by amplification stability / free-dimension self-similarity, immune to Dykema-Radulescu. 

VERDICT: AMPLIFICATION-AGNOSTIC. The one clean self-similar free-dimension invariant that exists in the literature (free Stein dimension, with an exact amplification law of the SAME form as the free-group compression law) NEITHER proves NOR obstructs F=R_+ for the infinite-variable factor — it goes to +infinity there, exactly as for L(F_inf), and the fundamental-group constraint it carries is vacuous at sigma=infinity. So the lever does NOT close the avenue as a clean win, and does NOT reopen it as a proper F. But it yields a genuine NEW unconditional partial on the FINITE truncations (below).

PRIMARY SOURCES VERIFIED THIS SESSION (all at source, not paraphrase):
- Caspers arXiv:2210.11128 "On the isomorphism class of q-Gaussian W*-algebras for infinite variables": M_q(H_R) NOT iso M_0(H_R) for -1<q!=0<1. Confirmed. Says NOTHING about F / amplification. (Re-confirms the dead L(F_inf) route.)
- Charlesworth-Nelson arXiv:1902.02379 "Free Stein Irregularity and Dimension" (CN21) + arXiv:2201.00062 "On Free Stein Dimension" (v2, 4 Jan 2022). THE machinery:
  * sigma(X):=n-Sigma*(X)^2; sigma <= delta* (non-microstates free entropy dim); Sigma*=0 (in particular Phi*<inf) => sigma(X)=n. sigma is a *-algebra (NOT a priori vN) invariant [making it vN-invariant would solve the free-group-factor iso problem — stated explicitly p.2].
  * AMPLIFICATION LAW (Thm 2.5, d=1): sigma(A (x) M_n(C), tau(x)tr_n) = 1 + (1/n^2)(sigma(A)-1). SAME FORM as Radulescu-Dykema L(F_r)_gamma law with sigma playing the free-rank role. This is the self-similar mechanism the prompt asked whether exists — IT EXISTS, as a free-dimension scaling.
  * FUNDAMENTAL-GROUP CONSTRAINT (Thm 6.5(3)): M a II_1 factor, sigma(M)<INFINITY, F(M) contains a rational !=1  =>  sigma(M)=1. (Proof divides by d^2-n^2; FINITENESS of sigma is an essential hypothesis.)
  * Prop 6.7: F(M) contains a rational !=1 AND sigma(M)>1  =>  sigma(M)=INFINITY. (Consistent with sigma=inf; NOT a contradiction.)
  * Extension to non-f.g. algebras (Def 6.1): upper sigma-bar = limsup over finite self-adjoint X of sigma(C<X>); CAN BE INFINITE for infinitely-generated A (stated p.16); still a trace-preserving-iso invariant.
- Miyagawa-Speicher arXiv:2203.00547 "A dual and conjugate system for q-Gaussians for all q" (Adv. Math. 413, 2023). Thm 1.1 + consequence (4): for FINITE d and ALL q in (-1,1), q-Gaussians (A_1..A_d) have a LIPSCHITZ conjugate system and Phi*(A_1..A_d)<INFINITY, NO restriction q^2 d<1. They state explicitly (p.~3, intro item after Thm 1.1) "the free entropy dimension is MAXIMAL for all q in the whole interval" i.e. delta*(A_1..A_d)=d for all q. => Sigma*=0 => sigma(Gamma_q(H_d))=d for every finite d, every q. [Supersedes/quantifies Shlyakhtenko math/0308093 Cor 3.2, which only gave delta*>=N(1-q^2N/(1-q^2N))>1 under q^2N<1 and is EXPLICITLY non-optimal — do not use the 0308093 bound where MS applies.]

THE ARGUMENT (THEOREM-level for the finite claim; agnostic for the infinite):
1. [THEOREM] For every finite N and every q in (-1,1): sigma(Gamma_q(H_N)) = N. [MS Phi*<inf => Sigma*=0 => sigma=n=N.]
2. [THEOREM] F(Gamma_q(H_N)) contains NO rational != 1, for every finite N>=2, every q. 
   Proof: Gamma_q(H_N) is a II_1 factor [Ricard/Nou/Sniady factoriality] with sigma=N, finite and >1. If some rational !=1 lay in F, Thm 6.5(3) (sigma<inf) forces sigma=1, contradicting sigma=N>=2. QED. 
   [This is a GENUINE NEW unconditional constraint on the finite-variable fundamental group — it does not resolve the Dykema-Radulescu dichotomy (which is about whether L(F_N) iso L(F_M), a question at DIFFERENT amplification indices being iso), but it does say: within a single Gamma_q(H_N), no rational compression M^{p/q}~M with p/q!=1. In particular F(Gamma_q(H_N)) != R_+ and != Q_+^*. Consistent with — and pointing toward — the Dykema-Radulescu branch-II value F={1} for the finite free-group factors, but PROVEN here without assuming the dichotomy, and extended to ALL q.]
3. [THEOREM, agnostic] sigma-bar(Gamma_q(H_inf)) = +infinity. 
   Proof: limsup over finite X of sigma(C<X>) >= lim_N sigma(C<s_1..s_N>) = lim_N N = infinity (step 1 along the canonical increasing family). 
   Same computation gives sigma-bar(L(F_inf))=infinity.
4. [CONSEQUENCE] Since sigma=infinity, BOTH Thm 6.5(3) and Prop 6.7 are VACUOUS for Gamma_q(H_inf): a rational (indeed all of R_+) in F is fully consistent with sigma=infinity. Free Stein dimension therefore DOES NOT OBSTRUCT F(Gamma_q(H_inf))=R_+ — and cannot, since it fails to distinguish L(F_inf) (F=R_+, Radulescu JAMS 5 (1992) 517) from anything at sigma=inf. It also does not PROVE it (the amplification law needs a continuous-dimension family LANDING BACK in the same iso class; no such interpolated q-Gaussian family Gamma_q(H_t), t real, is known to exist — the free-group case works only because L(F_t) is DEFINED for real t and closed under compression, a structural coincidence of q=0 that Caspers' non-iso result shows FAILS to transport to q!=0).

NET: item B is AMPLIFICATION-AGNOSTIC via the only extant self-similar free-dimension tool. F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) remains OPEN. The honest position is UNCHANGED at the top level (no unconditional F=R_+; no proper F), but SHARPENED: 
  (i) a new THEOREM F(Gamma_q(H_N)) has no rational !=1 (all finite N, all q) — the first unconditional structural constraint on any q-Gaussian fundamental group in the literature;
  (ii) the sharpest sub-question isolated: does a CONTINUOUS-DIMENSION q-Gaussian interpolation Gamma_q(H_t) (t real >0) exist with an amplification/compression law Gamma_q(H_t)_gamma iso Gamma_q(H_{f(t,gamma)})? IF YES for the infinite endpoint, F=R_+ follows by the Radulescu degeneration; Caspers 2210.11128 is EVIDENCE AGAINST such a clean family existing for q!=0 (the q=0 self-similarity is not obviously present), but does not refute a WEAKER asymptotic/approximate self-similarity at the infinite endpoint. This is the precise REDUCTION lemma.

HONESTY LEDGER: no F manufactured. F=R_+ NOT claimed (would need the interpolation lemma, unproven). Proper F NOT claimed (sigma=inf gives no obstruction). The value-blind physics tilt (N stays trace-gauge) survives ONLY as heuristic + the finite-N no-rational theorem, NOT as a proof at the infinite carrier. Phantom-citation check: Miyagawa-Speicher is 2203.00547 (NOT the earlier partial Dabrowski); free Stein amplification law is CN 1902.02379 Thm 2.5 / 2201.00062; Radulescu F(L(F_inf))=R_+ is JAMS 5 (1992) 517 (already in ledger).

### AMPLIFICATION-STABILITY LEVER for F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) — ATTEMPTED (8 Opus max-effort agents; 2 failed on StructuredOutput cap incl the dedicated Betti agent, but obstruction-hunt covered the Betti crux; synthesis + adjudication ran on 7 angles)

TARGET: prove F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) = R_+ DIRECTLY by amplification stability (M^t iso M for all t), immune to Dykema-Radulescu (never identifies M with any L(F)). This was the SOLE surviving unconditional lever to a value-blind negative on the physical (infinite matter-tower) carrier.

VERDICT: REDUCTION-TO-NAMED-LEMMA + honest OPEN. NOT a theorem, NOT obstructed, NOT a proper F. F(Gamma_q(H_inf))=R_+ holds UNCONDITIONALLY **iff** the CONTINUOUS-DIMENSION q-GAUSSIAN INTERPOLATION LEMMA (LEMMA-INTERP) holds; it is neither proved nor obstructed by any known method.

THE DECISIVE BETTI CALCULATION (the crux the swarm was built around):
- The fundamental-group amplification law is beta_k^(2)(M^t) = beta_k^(2)(M)/t^2 — exponent MINUS TWO (invariant lives on M (x) M^op), THEOREM, Connes-Shlyakhtenko math/0309343 Thm 2.4 (verbatim). Same -2 law holds for the Charlesworth-Nelson free-Stein dimension sigma (2201.00062 Thm 6.5(3)).
- DICHOTOMY (theorem): if t!=1 is in F(M) then X(M)=X(M)/t^2 forces X(M) in {0, +inf} for X in {beta_1^(2), sigma-1}. A FINITE-POSITIVE value would force F={1} (an obstruction). Only 0 and +inf are compression-compatible with nontrivial F.
- VALUE at H_inf: beta_1^(2)(Gamma_q(H_inf)) = +INFINITY (PLAUSIBLE, not theorem — every finite truncation gives beta_1=N-1->inf; L(F_inf) has beta_1=+inf with F=R_+; no rigidity mechanism known to pull it to a finite positive). sigma-bar(Gamma_q(H_inf))=+inf is THEOREM-grade (>= limsup_N sigma(Gamma_q(R^N)) = limsup_N N = +inf).
- CONSEQUENCE: at value +inf the dichotomy is VACUOUS (inf/t^2 = inf excludes no t). So beta_1/sigma PERMIT all of R_+ in F (obstruction ABSENT) but PROVE nothing. Amplification stability has the correct self-similar mechanism (the -2 scaling) but the loop does not close at the infinite target.

GENUINELY NEW UNCONDITIONAL THEOREM (byproduct, standalone-publishable — first structural constraint on ANY q-Gaussian fundamental group in the literature):
  For every finite N>=2 and every q in (-1,1), F(Gamma_q(R^N)) contains NO rational != 1.
  Proof chain (each link verbatim-verified): Miyagawa-Speicher 2203.00547 Cor 1.2(4) Phi*<inf hence delta_0=N for ALL q (NO q^2 N<1 restriction) => Charlesworth-Nelson free Stein dimension sigma=N => CN Thm 6.5(3) (F contains a rational !=1 AND sigma<inf => sigma=1); since sigma=N>=2!=1, no rational !=1 in F. [Author should re-verify MS Cor 1.2(4) + CN 6.5(3)/6.7 at primary source before any external use.]
  DOES NOT RESCUE THE PHYSICS: the physical carrier is the INFINITE matter-tower factor (finite-N theorem does not apply) or the 2-GENERATOR single-species chord factor (tied to the ~60-yr Dykema-Radulescu dichotomy). The finite-N no-rational theorem constrains neither in a way that pins N.

THE REDUCTION LEMMA (name it): CONTINUOUS-DIMENSION q-GAUSSIAN INTERPOLATION LEMMA (LEMMA-INTERP). For fixed q in (0,1), a family {Gamma_q(H_t)}_{t in (0,inf]} of tracial q-Gaussian II_1 factors, integer values = Gamma_q(R^n), closed under compression, with an amplification law whose infinite endpoint is a GLOBAL FIXED POINT f(inf,gamma)=inf for all gamma>0. IF it holds THEN F(Gamma_q(H_inf))=R_+ by the identical Radulescu degeneration used at q=0. [CORRECTED by the MS-DUAL HS COMPUTATION entry below (2026-07-08): the claim that LEMMA-INTERP forms (i) interpolation = (ii) beta_1=+inf = (iii) transport are EQUIVALENT is OVERSTATED. Only form (i) yields F=R_+ via Radulescu. Forms (ii),(iii) are NECESSARY-ONLY SHADOWS: (i)=>(ii),(iii) but NOT conversely; beta_1=+inf is REDUNDANT with the already-theorem-grade sigma-bar=+inf and does NOT close F=R_+. The single most concrete open computation is RELOCATED from form (ii)/beta_1 to form (i)/asymptotic self-similarity. The original form-(ii) text follows, now superseded:] Sharpest concrete equivalent form (ii, most estimable): beta_1^(2)(Gamma_q(H_inf))=+inf, i.e. the explicit Miyagawa-Speicher dual operators D_1..D_N (crossing partitions weighted q^{m(m-1)/2}) have HILBERT-SCHMIDT cross-commutators [D_i, X_{N+k}] on the full q-Fock space (Connes-Shlyakhtenko Thm 4.11 lift). [SUPERSEDED: the cross-commutators are EXACTLY ZERO, not nonzero-summable, and the CS lift is blocked at boundedness + finite-generation, not at the cross-commutator — see below.]

WHY THE EASY ROUTES ARE DEAD (foundational, theorem, verbatim): M=Gamma_q(H_inf) is strongly solid for ALL H incl infinite-dim [Ding-Peterson arXiv:2309.10161 Cor 8.12 [CORRECTED: 2-author Ding-Peterson, "Biexact von Neumann algebras", NOT the 3-author Ding-Kunnawalkam-Elayavalli-Peterson; verified at arXiv this session] — the load-bearing infinite-dim citation; upgrades Avsec Thm B which is dim<inf only]. Strongly solid => PRIME + NOT McDuff (clean two-line proofs), so the easy "M iso M(x)R => F=R_+" route is DEAD. Matrix amplification M(x)M_n iso M has NO functorial source for q!=0: the q-Gaussian functor sends orthogonal (+) to FREE product only at q=0 and to TENSOR only at q=1, to NEITHER for 0<q<1 — no free-dimension parameter exists. CRITICAL: strong solidity, no-Cartan, no-(T), primeness, not-McDuff, biexactness/W*-Akemann-Ostrand (the invariant that refuted the L(F_inf) route, Caspers 2210.11128) are ALL amplification-orbit-CONSTANT hence fundamental-group-AGNOSTIC — so the death of the McDuff route AND the death of the L(F_inf) route are both provably F-blind.

FRAMEWORK CONSEQUENCE: NO unconditional value-blind negative obtained. The residual PERSISTS as a strong conditional. N is neither proven gauge nor proven invariant on the infinite-variable carrier. Value-blind tilt survives as HEURISTIC only (both rigidity routes provably dead; q->1^- amenable-endpoint drift; MS maximal-delta tilt), now reinforced by the finite-N no-rational theorem but NOT upgraded. The most-physical non-amenable candidate supplies neither the first value-bearing carrier nor a proven value-blind one. Question reduces cleanly to LEMMA-INTERP (pure operator-algebra existence problem) for the infinite carrier, or Dykema-Radulescu for the 2-generator carrier.

CITATION HYGIENE:
- Radulescu F(L(F_inf))=R_+ = J. Amer. Math. Soc. 5 (1992) 517-532 (verified via AMS); NOT Invent. Math. 115 (1994) 347-389 (a DIFFERENT Radulescu paper: non-integer-index subfactors / the interpolated-L(F_t) compression machinery). Do not conflate.
- Connes-Shlyakhtenko math/0309343 (Thm 2.4 -2 law), Miyagawa-Speicher 2203.00547 (Cor 1.2(4) delta_0=N all q), Charlesworth-Nelson 2201.00062 (Thm 6.5(3), Prop 6.7), Caspers 2210.11128 (W*AO refutes L(F_inf) route), Ding-Peterson 2309.10161 (infinite-dim strong solidity; 2-author, corrected) — all verbatim-verified this session.
- FLAG: Kumar-Wirth arXiv:2406.06179 Thm 6.3 — the operator-valued twisted-Araki-Woods algebra over ANY separable Tomita correspondence on ANY type I base is UNIVERSALLY iso M(x)(scalar TAW). So the operator-valued-transport route (LEMMA-INTERP form iii) is decisively dead AS A PROOF STRATEGY (only ever yields the amplification itself, never a self-similar reduction) — but this is proof-strategy-failure, NOT an obstruction to F=R_+ being true. Attack LEMMA-INTERP via form (ii) (the MS HS-cross-commutator estimate), not form (iii).

No unification.tex edit (manuscript cites neither Radulescu nor Caspers; F-verdict unchanged). No F manufactured in either direction. Two agents failed on the StructuredOutput cap (dedicated Betti agent + assemble-verdict); the Betti crux was independently covered by obstruction-hunt, so the verdict is sound, but the beta_1=+inf VALUE (vs the {0,inf} dichotomy) rests on that less-detailed treatment and is correctly labeled PLAUSIBLE.

### MS-DUAL HILBERT-SCHMIDT COMPUTATION for beta_1(Gamma_q(H_inf)) — DONE (7 Opus max-effort agents w/ validated symbolic q-Fock engines; 2 failed on StructuredOutput cap incl the dedicated reduction-audit, but angle 1 delivered the audit; synth+adjudication on 5 angles)

TARGET (from the amplification-stability reduction, LEMMA-INTERP form (ii)): is beta_1^(2)(Gamma_q(H_inf))=+inf, via the Miyagawa-Speicher dual operators having summable Hilbert-Schmidt cross-commutators [D_i, X_{N+k}] feeding a Connes-Shlyakhtenko Thm 4.11 lift of the free dimension into the infinite carrier?

DECISIVE RESULT: the route is PROVABLY BLOCKED, but NOT where expected, and even if it worked it would NOT close F=R_+. Two-part honest verdict:

PART 1 — THE COMPUTATION (symbolically validated; scratchpad/qfock_crosscomm.py + shlyak_dual.py engines passed all MS Ex 4.1 checks):
- THEOREM: [D_i, X_{N+k}] = 0 EXACTLY for all q in (-1,1), every fresh mode (i<=N<N+k). This is the off-diagonal delta_ij=0 of the MS/Voiculescu conjugate relation [D_i,X_j]=delta_ij*P. Validated on all words up to length 8 over up to 4 letters. This DISCONFIRMS the premise the swarm was built on (that the cross-commutators are nonzero-but-summable): they VANISH identically, by an EXACT q-cancellation — the two individually-nonzero channels [D_i,l_m]=O(q^depth) and [D_i,a_m]=O(q^depth) cancel to all orders because X_m=l_m+a_m is the self-adjoint combination the MS identity is built on. Standalone-publishable, F-agnostic.
- THEOREM: so the HS-cross-commutator hypothesis of CS Thm 4.11 is satisfied in the STRONGEST way (norm 0), yet the lift STILL fails — at TWO OTHER hypotheses: (a) BOUNDEDNESS: CS Thm 4.11 requires the dual operators in B(L^2(M)) (bounded); MS's D_i are UNBOUNDED (conjugate variables of q-Gaussians); the bounded substitute r(e_i) (Shlyakhtenko right-creation) has defining-commutator HS-defect ||P_0 - Xi_q||^2_HS = sum_{n>=1} q^{2n} N^n = q^2 N/(1-q^2 N), which DIVERGES for N > 1/q^2 and at N=inf for EVERY q>0 (Shlyakhtenko math/0308093 Lemma 3.1, verbatim). (b) FINITE-GENERATION: CS free dimension Delta is a sup-inf over FINITE generating tuples; a finite q-Gaussian tuple generates only Gamma_q(R^N), never the II_1 factor Gamma_q(H_inf); no continuity of Delta along the tower is established, so Delta(Gamma_q(R^N))=N->inf does NOT transfer to the limit.
- CONSEQUENCE: beta_1^(2)(Gamma_q(H_inf)) is downgraded from PLAUSIBLE-+inf to genuinely OPEN (could be 0, finite-positive, or +inf). The q->1 singularity lives in ||D_i|| itself (unbounded for >=2 variables at every q!=0), NOT in the cross-commutator.

PART 2 — THE REDUCTION AUDIT (the decisive honesty finding): proving beta_1=+inf would NOT close F(Gamma_q(H_inf))=R_+. It would only RE-CONFIRM obstruction-absence ALREADY THEOREM-grade via sigma-bar=+inf. Mechanism: F acts through the CS -2 amplification law beta_1(M^t)=beta_1(M)/t^2; at value +inf this reads inf=inf/t^2 for ALL t — VACUOUS: excludes no t, forces no t, constructs none of the compressions M^t iso M that F=R_+ requires. The identical vacuity is already delivered by the theorem-grade sigma-bar(Gamma_q(H_inf))=+inf [Charlesworth-Nelson 2201.00062]. So forms (ii) [beta_1] and (iii) [transport] are NECESSARY-ONLY SHADOWS of form (i) [interpolation]: (i)=>(ii),(iii) but NOT conversely. The audit is SYMMETRIC: even a beta_1 DIVERGENCE would NOT reopen a proper-F possibility (F is not pinned by beta_1 in either direction at the infinite carrier). NET: the whole beta_1/MS-HS sub-thread was a RED HERRING for the stated goal F=R_+ — it advanced the program only by RECLASSIFYING/de-risking, not by closing.

RELOCATED OPEN PROBLEM: NOT "compute beta_1(Gamma_q(H_inf))" (a necessary-only shadow, redundant with sigma-bar). The true residual is LEMMA-INTERP FORM (i): does a continuous-dimension family {Gamma_q(H_t)} exist, closed under compression, with the infinite endpoint a global fixed point? IF yes, F=R_+ by Radulescu degeneration. Evidence LEANS AGAINST for q!=0 (Caspers 2210.11128 Gamma_q(H_inf) not iso L(F_inf); Kumar-Wirth 2406.06179 Thm 6.3 operator-valued transport yields only the amplification, never a self-similar reduction) — but neither refutes a WEAKER ASYMPTOTIC/APPROXIMATE self-similarity at the infinite endpoint. SINGLE MOST PROMISING NEXT STEP: determine whether Caspers' non-iso obstruction is amplification-orbit-CONSTANT (F-blind, so it does not kill the interpolation family) or actually rules out the family — that one dichotomy decides the thread. Attack via ASYMPTOTIC self-similarity (can the q^2 N/(1-q^2 N) HS wall be absorbed in an inductive-limit sense that survives N->inf?), NOT the dead exact-transport/beta_1 routes.

THEOREM-GRADE / STANDALONE (F-agnostic, hold to these and no more): (T1) [D_i,X_{N+k}]=0 exactly for all q. (T2) the q->1 singularity is in ||D_i||, not the cross-commutator. (T3, prior, upheld) sigma-bar(Gamma_q(H_inf))=+inf. (T4, prior, upheld) delta_0(Gamma_q(R^N))=N all q; beta_1(Gamma_q(R^N))=N-1 on CS "strong evidence" footing (note: algebraic CS beta_1 even on L(F_N) is CS's own "strong evidence" not a theorem; Thom/Alekseev continuous eta_1 VANISHES for free-group factors, so "+inf" only ever concerns the algebraic version). (T5, prior, upheld) F(Gamma_q(R^N)) has no rational !=1, all finite N>=2, all q. NOTHING at the infinite carrier is theorem-grade for F or beta_1.

### THE CASPERS DICHOTOMY — SETTLED: (A) F-BLIND (session 2026-07-08, angle: asymptotic-self-similarity). All facts re-verified VERBATIM at primary source (Caspers 2210.11128 + Ding-Peterson 2309.10161 full-text pdftotext extracts).

TARGET (the "single most promising next step" flagged by the MS-DUAL entry above): is the Caspers W*AO-failure obstruction AMPLIFICATION-ORBIT-CONSTANT (F-blind, does not kill the interpolation family => outcome A), or does it EXTEND to force F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) proper (outcome B)? And can asymptotic/inductive-limit self-similarity absorb the HS wall to yield a POSITIVE F=R_+?

VERDICT: (A) F-BLIND, DECISIVELY. Caspers non-iso does NOT obstruct F=R_+ and does NOT kill the interpolation family at the infinite endpoint. It is NOT (B). But it does NOT supply the positive construction either => top-level status for the FULL question "is F(Gamma_q(H_inf))=R_+" remains (C) beyond-current-technology: F-blind obstruction + no positive construction = UNDETERMINED. The specific inductive-defect-absorption mechanism this angle proposed is BLOCKED by a wall=threshold coincidence.

THEOREM (the decisive lever, verbatim primary source): biexactness — hence its FAILURE — is AMPLIFICATION-ORBIT-CONSTANT.
  - Ding-Peterson Prop 6.5 VERBATIM: "Let M be a biexact von Neumann algebra. Then M (x) B(K) and pMp are also biexact, for any Hilbert space K and nonzero projection p in P(M)." + Lemma 6.4(2) (compression pMpq is pMpq-nuclear). + line 1415: "every normal faithful representation of M is a reduction of an amplification of the standard form" (representation-independence).
  - => M biexact <=> M^t biexact for ALL t>0 (t<1: M^t=pMp; t>1: M^t=corner of M(x)B(K); reverse: M=(M^t)^{1/t}). BOTH directions close.
  - Ding-Peterson intro lines 150-151 VERBATIM: "Casper's result shows, in fact, that M_q(H) is not biexact." => Caspers' W*AO-failure = non-biexactness FOR THIS ALGEBRA, certified by DP themselves from both sides (Caspers Rmk 2.3: biexact icc group => L(Gamma) has W*AO).
  - CONCLUSION [THEOREM]: the Caspers invariant is CONSTANT on the amplification orbit of Gamma_q(H_inf) => it CANNOT distinguish Gamma_q(H_inf) from Gamma_q(H_inf)^t => CANNOT force F proper. OUTCOME (B) IS REFUTED. This confirms the ledger's standing claim (previously asserted, now PROVEN verbatim) that W*AO is amplification-orbit-constant exactly as strong solidity/biexactness/primeness are.

WHY (A)-F-BLIND STILL DOES NOT GIVE F=R_+ (the honest terminal): F=R_+ needs the POSITIVE construction = LEMMA-INTERP form (i), a continuous-dimension family {Gamma_q(H_t)}_{t real} closed under compression with infinite endpoint a global fixed point. The true obstruction to (i) is NOT the W*AO invariant (it is F-blind) but the ABSENCE of a continuous-dimension q-deformed functor: M_q is a functor of a Hilbert space, defined at integer or infinite dim only; there is no "M_q(H_t)" for non-integer t. At q=0 the family exists as a STRUCTURAL COINCIDENCE (L(F_t) defined for real t, free dimension is a continuous parameter, Radulescu/Dykema). Caspers non-iso is EVIDENCE this coincidence does not transport to q!=0, but the operative gap is the missing continuous functor.

THE INDUCTIVE-DEFECT-ABSORPTION MECHANISM IS BLOCKED (this angle's specific new finding, THEOREM-grade coincidence):
  - STRUCTURAL: Gamma_q(H_inf) = (\/_N Gamma_q(R^N))'' = von Neumann inductive limit of the finite truncations along trace-preserving inclusions (Bozejko-Speicher functoriality). So the tower picture is legitimate.
  - The naive bounded-dual self-embedding at level N needs Shlyakhtenko's right-creation dual r(e_i), HS-defect ||P_0 - Xi_q||^2_HS = q^2 N/(1-q^2 N) [Shlyakhtenko math/0308093, DIVERGES iff q^2 N >= 1, i.e. N >= 1/q^2 — RE-VERIFIED verbatim this session].
  - Caspers Thm 3.2 needs a fixed d with q^2 d > 1 (base B=M_q(R^d)) PLUS infinitely many orthogonal B-invariant subspaces (Thm 3.1 hypothesis: "infinitely many subspaces M_i") — a genuine N=inf COLLECTIVE phenomenon; finite truncations have no such infinite family and ARE biexact [DP intro (5): finite-dim q-Gaussians biexact, Shlyakhtenko/Kuznetsova].
  - WALL = THRESHOLD COINCIDENCE (decisive): the HS wall N>1/q^2 and the Caspers obstruction threshold q^2 d>1 are the IDENTICAL dimension. Consequence: there is NO window with a genuine self-similar compression (M^t iso M, t!=1) at finite level with small propagatable defect. Below the wall (N<1/q^2): defect finite BUT M_q(R^N) is biexact/RIGID (F has no rational !=1, prior theorem T5) => no self-similar compression to propagate. Above the wall (N>1/q^2): defect INFINITE (bounded-dual lift undefined) AND Caspers collective obstruction ON. The wall is NOT absorbed; it marks the exact crossover rigid-finite -> obstructed-infinite. So the inductive-defect route does NOT construct the self-embedding.
  - CONTRAST that DOES work but is F-agnostic: DP's OWN proof of strong solidity of Gamma_q(H_inf) [Thm 8.11 -> Cor 8.12 VERBATIM] IS a finite-dim-exhaustion ("there exists finite-dim H_0 with ||E_{M_q(H_0)}(u_j)-u_j||_2<eps; since H_0 finite-dim, Avsec Prop 4.1 gives (+)_{m>=2k}L_m weakly contained in the coarse correspondence as M_q(H_0)-bimodule"). This asymptotic machinery SUCCEEDS — but only for weak-containment/strong-solidity conclusions, NEVER a self-COMPRESSION M^t iso M. It is amplification-orbit-constant, hence F-blind.

q -> 1^- HURTS, does not help: as q->1, 1/q^2 -> 1, so the obstructed regime N>1/q^2 swallows almost the whole tower — Caspers fires at the SMALLEST dimension (needs only d=2 once q>1/sqrt2). The amenable-endpoint drift helps only in the singular limit q=1 itself (abelian degeneration, no longer a II_1 factor, no longer the physical carrier). For every q in (1/sqrt2, 1) the HS-wall/Caspers obstruction and the amenable drift pull OPPOSITE and the obstruction wins. So q->1^- does NOT rescue asymptotic self-similarity.

NET / FRAMEWORK: ZERO new pin on N. Top-level UNCHANGED — F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) genuinely UNDETERMINED by present operator-algebra methods (outcome C for the full question), now with the dichotomy's (A)-vs-(B) sub-question CLOSED: (A) F-BLIND is proven (Prop 6.5 verbatim), (B) refuted. N stays trace-scale gauge on the DSSYK carrier as before.

## COMPLETE AMPLIFICATION-SENSITIVE INVARIANT CENSUS for F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) — OUTCOME (C), verbatim-verified

QUESTION (this swarm): enumerate EVERY von Neumann invariant that could be amplification-SENSITIVE (distinguish M from M^t) and check if any is BOTH (a) sensitive AND (b) non-vacuous/computable for Gamma_q(H_inf). If none, that is outcome (C): F beyond current invariant technology.

ANSWER: (C), cleanly. The dichotomy sub-question (does Caspers W*AO obstruct F?) is (A) F-BLIND — CONFIRMS the prior T6 entry from an independent full census.

THE CENSUS (each item verified at primary source this session):
- GENUINELY SENSITIVE FAMILY (scales by 1/t^2), all VACUOUS at H_inf:
  * Algebraic beta_1^(2) (Connes-Shlyakhtenko, math/0309343): the ONE truly sensitive invariant; 0<beta_1<inf would force F={1} (Peterson math/0605033 compression beta_1(M^t)=beta_1(M)/t^2). For Gamma_q(H_inf): OPEN, but morally +inf (infinite-generator endpoint of L(F_n) where beta_1=n-1 -> inf). If +inf then inf/t^2=inf => amplification-BLIND anyway. VACUOUS.
  * Continuous beta_1^(2) (Thom): PROVEN ==0 for ALL finite von Neumann algebras [Popa-Vaes 1401.1186, "always vanishes"; Alekseev 1312.5647 free-group case]. Universally trivial => blind AND vacuous. Bonus: nontrivial F itself FORCES it to vanish [Alekseev-Kyed compression, quadratic scaling] — so it can NEVER witness F proper, by construction.
  * Free Stein dimension sigma (Charlesworth-Nelson 2201.00062): Thm 2.5 sigma(A(x)M_n)=1+(sigma(A)-1)/n^2 (sensitive via sigma-1, same 1/t^2), and Rmk 1.6 sigma <= beta_1^(2)-beta_0^(2)+1. But sigma-bar=+inf for infinitely-generated A (Def 6.1 remark: "could be infinite"); Gamma_q(H_inf) needs infinitely many generators => sigma-bar=+inf => 1+inf/t^2=inf => BLIND. VACUOUS.
  * Free entropy dim delta/delta0/delta*: ill-defined / not a clean *-iso invariant at infinite generators (microstates problem open); VACUOUS.
  * Higher beta_k^(2), k>=2: =0 (tree-like/free) => VACUOUS. Cost: =beta_1+1 conj, groupoid-only, VACUOUS for a pure factor.
- CATEGORICAL FAMILY (all amplification-CONSTANT, hence F-BLIND regardless of value):
  * biexact / W*AO / (AO)+ / strong(AO) / solid / strongly solid / properly proximal / prime / full / McDuff / Cartan-count(=0): MASTER THEOREM Ding-Peterson 2309.10161 Prop 6.5 (M biexact => M(x)B(K) and pMp biexact) + "solid <=> M(x)B(l^2) solid". Caspers' NOT-W*AO is a STRONGER negative than NOT-biexact (Thm 7.19: biexact=>W*AO; converse unproven), and the Wick-word witness (Caspers Thm 3.1: infinitely many tau-orthogonal B-bimodular M_i with uniform (1+delta) bound) survives M->M(x)M_n by the SAME [T(x)S,a(x)1]=[T,a](x)S argument DP use in Prop 6.5 => NOT-W*AO also amplification-stable (PLAUSIBLE, structural). Every categorical invariant flips truth-value on NO amplification.
  * Connes tau/chi/Sd (type-III invariants): TRIVIAL for II_1. Flow of weights / Takesaki-Connes / fundamental-group-of-II_inf-core: TRIVIAL for II_1 (the II_inf core is exactly M(x)B(H) with the trace-scaling R_+^* flow; F(M) IS the target, not an independent witness).

VERDICT: NO invariant is both amplification-SENSITIVE and NON-VACUOUS for Gamma_q(H_inf). The only sensitive invariants are the L^2-Betti/Stein 1/t^2-family, and each is vacuous here (continuous beta_1 identically 0; algebraic beta_1 open-and-morally-infinite; Stein sigma-bar=+inf). => F(Gamma_q(H_inf)) is genuinely UNDETERMINED by present operator-algebra invariant technology. This is a citable terminal statement: F is COMPUTED for strongly-solid no-(T) no-Cartan factors essentially ONLY for L(F_inf) (Radulescu JAMS 5 (1992) 517, F=R_+), and nowhere else — Gamma_q(H_inf) sits precisely in the gap.

DOES NOT pin N. The physics tilt F=R_+ (=> N gauge, value-blind) survives as HEURISTIC only (both rigidity routes dead + amenable q->1 drift), NOT theorem. ### DARK ENERGY / TIME-DEPENDENT N (7 Opus max-effort agents; 2 failed on cap = desi-status + everpresent-revisit, core physics covered by intrinsic-wz + bbn-cap + adjudication)

QUESTION: is N (=Lambda) time-dependent (DESI evolving DE), and if so does that (a) change the derivability verdict, (b) make the framework predict a falsifiable w(z)? Distinction held throughout: fixing the SHAPE w(z) (empirical) != fixing the SCALE N (the CC problem, proven closed).

ANSWER (1) DERIVABILITY UNCHANGED — time-dependence fixes SHAPE-CLASS, not SCALE. Trace-rescaling homogeneity tau_R->lambda*tau_R acts as ONE global scalar on the single semifinite trace at every epoch: N(tau)->lambda*N(tau), so only ratios N(tau)/N(tau_0) are candidate outputs; absolute scale free pointwise. Realistic FLRW comoving observer = Type-II_infinity (NO max-entropy state) fixes even LESS than the II_1 idealisation. N: free CONSTANT -> free FUNCTION, still scale-free. CC problem persists verbatim. Does NOT "change everything."

ANSWER (2) FALSIFIABLE w(z)? A real falsifiable SHAPE-CLASS prediction (c_Lambda H^2 = running-vacuum, pure H^2, no E_Pl^4, w->-1 asymptote) — but it CLASHES with DESI DR2 on BOTH axes:
- SHAPE (the deeper bite): DESI DR2 central preference = quintom-B (w0>-1, wa<0, CROSSING w=-1 near z~0.3-0.5). Single-component running-vacuum Lambda(H)=Lambda_0+c_Lambda H^2 is structurally NON-CROSSING (touches -1 only at z=0, one-sided for either sign of c_Lambda) for ANY value/sign. Crossing needs composite wXCDM = running vacuum + phantom matter [Sola 2410.20382, verified] which the framework LACKS. Wrong functional form.
- AMPLITUDE: matching |wa|~0.8-1.1 needs c_Lambda ~ 2, ~15-40x over the BBN cap |c_Lambda|<~0.08-0.12, past the perturbative regime; saturating the cap gives |wa|<~0.05 (~20x too small). Framework's own text already concedes nu "unobservably small, a consistency requirement not a live signal."
- Corroborating null: direct Lambda(t)CDM fit to DESI DR2 drives running -> zero, LCDM favoured [Avsajanishvili 2603.03468, verified].
- Escape valve (cuts the other way): if DESI's crossing is a CPL-parametrization ARTIFACT (thawing quintessence w>=-1 fits comparably [Dinda-Maartens 2504.15190, verified]), the framework's one-sided non-crossing w(z) survives as a live SHAPE-only prediction. So this is a TENSION, not a falsification of the framework.

THEOREM-grade (verified in-file + primary source): scale-freedom under trace homogeneity unchanged by time-dependence; c_Lambda H^2 = RVM (3nu/8pi)E_Pl^2 H^2 term-for-term; BBN cap |c_Lambda|<~0.08-0.12; single-component RVM cannot cross w=-1; KLS central zero-mode STATIC (sources variance not flow); prop:pred-cc-variance STATIC 1e-61. OPEN: whether thermal-time actually GENERATES a running (paper: left open); no internal dynamical law for N(tau). SPECULATION to avoid: manufacturing an H^4/two-component sector to force a DESI-matching crossing.

PAPER EDITS MADE (verified, rebuilt EXIT=0, 237pp, 0 undefined):
- SHARPENED rem:cc-desi-dr2 (~l.20920): the clash is on SHAPE (non-crossing single-H^2 RVM vs DESI's phantom crossing) BEFORE amplitude; added the amplitude inequality (c_Lambda~2, 15-40x over BBN); the Lambda(t)CDM->zero null; the CPL-artifact/thawing-quintessence escape valve; and the closing sentence that a time-dependent N is a free FUNCTION with the scale still free at every epoch (folds in the rem:N-open-problem cross-link).
- 3 new bibitems, ALL verified at primary source this session: SolaPeracaulaComposite2024 (2410.20382, wXCDM composite), AvsajanishviliLtCDM2026 (2603.03468, Lambda(t)CDM null), DindaMaartens2025 (2504.15190, CPL-artifact/thawing).

CITATION HYGIENE: all clean, primary-source verified. DESIDR2_2025 = 2503.14738 (PRD 112 083515); SolaPeracaula2026RVM = 2606.05352; MorenoPulidoSola2020 = 2005.03164. No numerology; c_Lambda neither fitted nor derived, only bounded. No manufactured DESI agreement.

- The paper's own saturation no-go does NOT bite: prop:crossed-product-saturation-nogo is an n=2 statement (saturation defect D = delta^2 S_rel − E_can); the Newtonian chain runs entirely at n=1, where rem:effective-saturation-regime states verbatim the linearised branch "closes in-regime, and needs no saturation."
- The genuinely obstructed object is ONE ROUTE, not the lever: the massive-CHM ball-modular scanning family. Team A1 (all primary source): the massive diamond modular Hamiltonian is a DECLARED open problem — Longo-Morsella 2012.00565v1 claimed the massive ball formula, the proof gap is acknowledged in print (Bostelmann-Cadamuro-Minz 2209.04681: "we consider the problem still open") and the published version was RETITLED "The massless modular Hamiltonian" (CMP 400 (2023) 1181); the first-order-in-mass correction is already NONLOCAL in the simplest solved case (Cadamuro-Frob-Minz 2312.04629: antilocal kernels, root cause = antilocality of massive one-particle operators); Minz-Tonni 2512.04659 (Dec 2025, numerical) confirms nonlocality for all m>0. Route A (direct massive-CHM): OBSTRUCTED / genuinely absent.
- The WEDGE/NULL route survives and is nearly complete: null-cut modular theory is UNIVERSAL (mass/interaction-blind) — FLPW 1605.08072 (Faulkner-LEIGH-PARRIKAR-Wang; ANEC), Casini-Teste-Torroba 1703.10656, Ceyhan-Faulkner CMP 377 (2020) 999, Hollands-Longo CMP 406 (2025) 269 — which is exactly why thm:clausius-SM already delivers the per-wedge scalar Clausius identity for SM matter; and the four inversion steps (trace-free pointwise linear algebra / Bianchi promotion / fixed-volume coefficient / Lambda seam) are theorem-grade GIVEN the pointwise null-null equation of state.

### THE ONE MISSING LEMMA (named): E0-lin-SM pointwise-extraction (assembly) lemma
For the SM pAQFT net, Hadamard state, band-limited window 1/E_star <~ l << 1/mu_O: the per-wedge Clausius identity of thm:clausius-SM admits a small-patch limit UNIFORM in (point p, null direction k), yielding the pointwise linearised null-null equation of state with direction-independent coefficient, errors bounded by (ml)^2, alpha(1/l), (mu_O l)^{2Delta-d}, scalar/trace contamination dropping into the Lambda seam. STATUS: OPEN for the physical interacting SM; THEOREM at first order in conformal perturbation theory in the CGM-safe window Delta > d/2 (Speranza 1602.01380, verified; the physical Higgs escapes the danger window per rem:qnec-sat-status). STRICTLY WEAKER than hyp:qnec-saturation (which implies it but is not consumed). UNTOUCHED by the n=2 no-go. Given the lemma, steps (i)-(iii) deliver the linearised tensor equation up to the free Lambda, hence g_N = GM/R^2 for terminally decohered bodies.
- Jacobson-2015 small-ball route: adjudicated as controlling the n=1 first law only, with the Casini-Galante-Myers Delta<=d/2 danger window; planets sit at mR ~ 1e16 (opposite regime), so the small-ball window is NOT the mechanism — the null route is.

## EPS-TAILS RATE QUESTION SETTLED (U3 follow-up): sharpness proven, eps^{1/2} confined to state norms, T5 clause localised + quadratically weakened
Assessed the three-part rate question left open by the PROVE-OR-FAIL #2 entry. All claims verified by
independent computation (positivity ceiling: 0/2000 violations; eigenvalue-shift linearity in eps across
4 decades, shift/eps ~ 0.2-0.34; extremal-state trace norms exact to 4 digits).

(a) SHARPNESS — RESOLVED, THEOREM. The general-state rate ||rho-PrhoP||_1 = Theta(eps^{1/2}), not just O:
    the coherent band-edge state Psi = sqrt(1-eps) phi + sqrt(eps) psi has tail weight exactly eps and
    ||rho-PrhoP||_1 >= ||P rho Q||_1 = sqrt(eps(1-eps)), matching the 2 eps^{1/2}+eps upper bound.
    No better general rate exists; hunting one is provably futile.
(b) BUT the negative resolution is SOFTER than feared — the eps^{1/2} does NOT infect eigenvalue budgets.
    THEOREM (Cauchy-Schwarz + Schur-complement/Weyl bootstrap, finite-dim = exactly H0's reading):
    positivity gives ||P rho Q||_op <= sqrt(||PrhoP|| ||QrhoQ||) <= eps^{1/2}; the leakage blocks are
    purely off-diagonal in the (P,Q) grading, first-order shifts vanish identically, and every eigenvalue
    shift vs the block-diagonal part is <= 2 eps/delta once eps^{1/2} <= delta/2. So S3's in-band gap
    degrades O(eps/eta) for ARBITRARY (non-commuting) tails; two-cluster reading required (tail cloud of
    O(eps)-small eigenvalues appears; "smallest non-zero eigenvalue" = in-band cluster). The commuting/
    thermal O(eps) class matters ONLY for trace-norm items; and whether the thermal-time states even lie
    in that class is itself co-scoping-conditional (KMS wrt modular flow, not H_m[g_0]) — but by (b)
    nothing downstream now hinges on membership. At eps ~ e^{-beta E*} both rates are far below every
    other budget: the rate question is closed as bookkeeping, zero physical stakes.
(c) T5 OPERATOR CLAUSE — stays the sole substantive residual, but SHARPENED twice. THEOREM by inspection
    (K_k structure l.9304 + eq:planck-cutoff): Q C_k P = Q[(H_m[g]-H_m[g_0]) - kappa^{-1}Q^{(k)}[f]]P —
    clock/grav/Sigma legs commute, leakage sourced SOLELY by the gravity-matter sector. And the zero-mode
    shift enters QUADRATICALLY (same bootstrap): needs only ||Q Q^{(k)}[f] P||_op <~ (delta_C eps)^{1/2},
    quadratically weaker than the linear budget the hyp implied; NEW honest caveat surfaced: delta_C must
    be read on P C_k P (+) Q C_k Q, so the genericity clause must also keep spec(Q C_k Q) away from 0
    (band-edge clock-compensation margin). Missing lemma pinned: buffered two-scale cross-band bound
    ||(1-P_{E*}) Q^{(k)}[f] P_{E*-Delta}||_op from Fourier decay of the smearing; app:conformal-cutoff is
    template ONLY (expectation values in E<<E* states, not operator norms; hard edge = power law).
PAPER EDIT: one paragraph appended to rem:eps-tails-status recording (1)-(3). Hypothesis NOT promoted;
hyp text untouched. Build: latexmk EXIT=0, 240 pp., 0 undefined. No external citations added (all
arguments self-contained finite-dim; Pye-Donnelly-Kempf/CHM refs pre-existing in app:conformal-cutoff).
LABEL: rate question RESOLVED-NEGATIVELY-BUT-CLEANLY (eps^{1/2} sharp, confined, moot); hyp:eps-tails
residual = ONE operator lemma (T5 cross-band coupling bound), unchanged in status, weakened in target.

STATUS FOUND. eq:mu-photon-bound (rem:lorentz-empirical) carried the session-verified LHAASO
subluminal value mu < 1/(8.2 E_Pl) ~ 1.0e-29 eV^-1, but FIVE citing sites still had the pre-fix

eV^-1; Planck-natural exclusion factor 7.6-8.2 (was 7.6-10); BAW-to-photon gap 5.3 decades
(log10(2.0e-24/1.0e-29)=5.30, was 5.4); rem:mu-tension now quotes the subluminal-specific Table-I
value 8.2 E_Pl.

PRIMARY-SOURCE VERIFICATION (all re-checked today at source):
- LHAASO arXiv:2402.06009 = PRL 133 071501: Table I read directly (arXiv HTML): n=1 subluminal
  1.0e20 GeV, superluminal 1.1e20 GeV; n=2 subluminal 7.0e11 GeV (95% CL). Transcription CONFIRMED.
- Vasileiou et al. PRD 87 122001 (2013): E_QG,1 > 7.6 E_Pl subluminal 95% CL, GRB 090510. CONFIRMED.
- Campbell-Tobar-Galliou-Goryachev PRD 108 102006 (arXiv:2304.00688, full PDF read): beta_0 < 62.4
  at 3sigma, mode B_{3,0,0} at 5.505 MHz, m_eff = 8.5 mg, hardening-sign fit, single-phonon path
  "omega > 200 MHz in a 10 mK environment" -- all exactly as transcribed in prop:pred-baw; NO
  quantitative next-generation sensitivity projection exists in the source (confirmed absent).
- 2024-26 sweep: NO better subluminal linear TOF bound published. KM2A DisCan re-analysis (Xi-Shu
  arXiv:2508.00656, Chin.Phys.C accepted): 5.4e19 GeV subluminal = WEAKER; Piran-Ofengeim PRD 109
  L081501: 5.9 E_Pl = weaker. The >=1e5 E_Pl LHAASO photon-decay/splitting limits are
  SUPERLUMINAL-only (photon decay kinematics), inapplicable to mu>0: do not import them.
  Door et al. PRL 134 063002 (2025) confirmed real (Yb King plot; no mu transcription -- paper
  correctly cites as complementary-only). No BAW beta_0 update beyond PRD 108 102006 found.

RACE VERDICT (honest): (1) the race to the Planck-natural point mu = 1/E_Pl is OVER -- photon
timing won it (2013-2024), dead by factor 7.6-8.2; in the LAB that point would still need 4.4
decades of beta_0-class gain, i.e. the lab lost. (2) The surviving matched branch (mu ~ 1e-33
eV^-1, E_QG,1 ~ 1e4-1e5 E_Pl) is magnitude-UNREACHABLE on any published program: TOF sensitivity
scales ~ E_max*D/(Delta-t); best published improvement prospect is factor ~3 for n=1
(Piran-Ofengeim); BAW needs 5.3 decades before touching territory GRB has not excluded, with no
published projection; isotope/King-plot channels lack even a mu transcription. NOTHING resolves the
matched-branch magnitude within a decade -- the paper's "beyond foreseeable timing reach in
magnitude" stands verified. (3) First-to-move: (a) a CONFIRMED GRB LIV anomaly (Song-Ma class,
E_LV ~ 3.6e17 GeV subluminal linear ~ mu ~ 3e-27 eV^-1) would falsify the matched-branch magnitude
-- but is itself ~2.5 decades in tension with LHAASO already; (b) the cheapest REAL increment is a
softening-sign re-fit of the EXISTING Campbell et al. data (removes the no-cancellation
conditionality of the lab exclusion; re-analysis, no new hardware). Photon TOF remains the binding
channel; near-term live content = FORM commitments (subluminal sign, strict linearity, universality).

BO-QUARTIC FALSIFIER ROW (proposed in an earlier session, never added): REJECTED -- do not add.
The Taylor mathematics is sound and its content ALREADY sits in eq:U5-expansion (D4) (exact
Lagrange x^4/24 remainder: quartic term +(mu dt^2/24 hbar^2)H^4). But as a predictions-table row it
fails on three independent grounds:
(1) WRONG-BOUND IDENTIFICATION: the quartic term of Sigma_dt feeds v_g at CUBIC order (n=3), not
    quadratic: implicit differentiation of the exact fixed point eq:h-fixedpoint gives
    v_g/c = 1 - mu E + (3/2)(mu E)^2 + (1/6)(mu dt^2/hbar^2)E^3 + ... (verified numerically to
    machine precision today). The n=2 coefficient is NOT the cosine quartic: it is second order in
    mu, slaved (eta_eff = +xi_eff^2, recovery sign, split-INDEPENDENT), sitting at E_QG,2 = 1/mu ~
    1e24 GeV matched -- 12 decades beyond LHAASO's n=2 bound (7.0e11 GeV sublum.). "Over-determined
    against the GRB quadratic bound" was a category error (E^4 term of h conflated with the
    p^4/E_Pl^2 quadratic-LIV coefficient).
(2) NOT A PREDICTION: the n=3 coefficient mu*dt^2/6 depends on the (alpha,dt) split -- convention
    up to the 9-decade window of rem:pred-baw-ceiling (matching fixes ONLY alpha*dt^2,
    rem:mu-tension/eq:mu-matching). A row whose magnitude floats over ~18 decades is a
    discovery-scenario dt-meter (rem:pred-baw-reach(ii) already says a detection "would fix
    (alpha,dt)"), not a falsifier.
(3) MAGNITUDE DEAD IN-WINDOW: relative to the (already 4-decades-unreachable) linear term the n=3
    term is (dt E/hbar)^2/6 < 1/6 in-band ALWAYS, <~1e-4 for 13-18 TeV GRB photons anywhere in the
    stated split window (hbar/dt >= 1e15 eV), ~1e-10 for BAW mode energies; no published E_QG,3
    bound even exists to cite.
PAPER EDITS (the honest residue of the proposal, in lieu of the row): (i) remainder in
prop:lorentz-sigma-dispersion statement and eq:lorentz-sigma-vg corrected from O(mu^2 E^2) to
O(mu^2 E^2 + mu dt^2 E^3/hbar^2) -- the old remainder UNDERSTATED the truncation error at the
small-alpha end of the split window (E > alpha), same error class as A-series overclaims, though
empirically inert; (ii) one parenthetical added to rem:lorentz-empirical stating the exact
correlated tower, the slaved eta_eff = +xi_eff^2, the in-band <1/6 bound on the n=3 term, and that
every coefficient beyond linear is determined by (mu, dt) alone -- sharpens "strict linearity" into
its precise form-commitment content. No new bibitems; eq:h-fixedpoint / rem:pred-baw-ceiling refs
verified in-file.

SOCCER-BALL CROSS-CHECK (rem:two-body-framework(b) caveat, added this session): affects NO
empirical row. BAW rows are excitation-scoped (E_mode ~ 0.3-30 GeV << band edge hbar/dt >= 1e15
eV); the composite-c.o.m. pathology (<H_s>/2E_Pl ~ 1e24 Planck-natural, ~1e19 matched) lives ABOVE
the band edge, where rem:pred-baw-ceiling's saturation (fractional amplitude lambda = mu hbar/dt <=
1e-9) + slow-branch excision already governs -- (b)'s "not resolved" marker is correct at the level
of first principles (which composites are in-band is exactly the split-window scope clause), and
its operational content for the empirical rows is already carried by rem:pred-baw-ceiling +
rem:pred-baw-microscope (MICROSCOPE forces the excitation reading). No number changes; cross-ref
would be cosmetic, not added.

LABEL: RESOLVES-EMPIRICALLY (Planck-natural branch: already resolved NEGATIVE by data; matched

### THE THREE-FACES THEOREM: ONE-DATUM (theorem-modulo-sign-lookup), with mandatory overclaim fences
- NOT THREE: bare clock zero c is not a third copy — c=q0 FALSE as operator identity; c separately discharged (Delta_omega Omega=Omega).
- NOT TWO: the energy-vs-entropy split is REJECTED by the paper's own allocation — the E^4 density job belongs to the Sakharov counterterm (different object); the genuine energy ZERO (q0, E^1 additive) IS the same freedom as the trace scale.
- THE PROVABLE EQUIVALENCE (one line each way, on the in-file dual-trace formula tau_R(a)=int dq e^{beta q}<q|a|q>): q -> q+q0 rescales tau_R -> e^{beta q0} tau_R; any tau -> lambda tau shifts every entropy S -> S + log lambda. Hence TRACE NORMALISATION (multiplicative), ENTROPY ZERO-POINT (additive +log lambda), and DRESSED ENERGY ZERO q0 (additive, converted by beta) are three UNIT-FACES of ONE freedom = the dual-action/trace-scaling orbit = the Lambda seam = the N-datum.
- GATE (A2): the abstract certificate tau o theta_s = e^{-s} tau (Takesaki, Acta Math. 131 (1973) ~Thm 8.1 / TOA II Ch. XII) is NOT yet cited in-file (paper cites Takesaki2003 only for Thm X.1.17/Ch. X.2); certify signs at primary source against the e^{beta q} convention BEFORE writing the conditional cross-link.
- WHAT IT BUYS (conditional): the framework carries ONE supplied scale datum instead of two (R2-link's zero-datum merges into N) — conditional on pos:thermal-time (dressed) + hyp:clpw-realisation + H0-co-scoping.
- OVERCLAIM FENCES (each wrong-by-theorem or circular; PROPHYLACTIC — a documented error class): (1) R2-link does NOT stop being an independent postulate (phase content untouched). (2) NOTHING becomes computable about N ~ 1e122 — "thermal time fixes N" is FALSE BY THEOREM (the dual weight is theta-hat-invariant: thermal time supplies no selector on the orbit). (3) A q0-first derivation of Lambda is CIRCULAR (beta carries the background). (4) thermal time pins the MODULAR zero, not the adjoined observer zero q0 = trace seam. (5) Never write c=q0=seam as a fixed-operator equation.

### LIVE DEFECT FOUND (exp/log face-conflation, 3 loci — fix GATED on author sign-off, touches N's semantics):
The paper (and one of THIS SESSION'S own edits) conflates the multiplicative trace face with the additive entropy face:
 [a] rem:N-open-problem clause (i): "tau_R -> lambda tau_R (i.e. N -> lambda N)" — under trace rescaling the ENTROPY (and N=S_dS is an entropy) shifts ADDITIVELY: N -> N + log lambda. Proposed fix: "(i.e. N -> N + log lambda: the entropy zero-point, and with it N=S_dS, shifts additively)".
 [b] the Edit-A amplification sentence (ADDED THIS SESSION): "the physical value N ~ 1e122 reappears as the amplification index" — the amplification index is the TRACE-face object, i.e. e^N, not N. Proposed fix: "the physical count e^N (N=S_dS ~ 1e122) reappears as the amplification index". [SELF-CORRECTION: this defect is in text I added in the three-avenue Edit A.]
 [c] rem:qnec-sat-status step (iv): "(the single Type-II additive constant of Prop pred-cc, whose scaling is posited, not computed)" — pred-cc's constant is the ENTROPY zero (l.13437-40: "cannot absorb an energy density"); the seam here is the free fixed-point VALUE Lambda_0 = the trace normalisation of rem:N-open-problem. Proposed reroute accordingly.
NO DOWNSTREAM CONCLUSION CHANGES (the freedom is the same one-dimensional gauge either way; scale-homogeneity and all no-gos survive verbatim — this is semantics hygiene, not substance).

### THE WILDCARD (antilocality test): SURVIVED on the wedge route; diamond route CONFIRMED DEAD
- WEDGE ROUTE (the route thm:clausius-SM and cor:newtonian-limit actually use): the antilocal m^1 obstruction lives ENTIRELY in the chirality-off-diagonal = scalar-bilinear = TRACE channel (CFM 2312.04629: H^(1)_11=H^(1)_22=0; G12 ~ m K0). On the null cut this channel is EXACTLY the trace direction annihilated by k^2=0 ((delta g_ab)k^a k^b = 0; T_kk = T_kk^traceless — both sympy-verified). The diamond's linear obstruction is PROJECTED OUT on the wedge/null route. Antilocality sub-threat: CLOSED.
- DIAMOND ROUTE: REFUTED-AS-STATED. The antilocal contamination is LINEAR Theta((ml) log(ml)) for the free field at GENERIC positive-frequency (admissible coherent) excitations — verified by referee 1 AND independently re-verified by the adjudicator with an admissibility check neither had run (flip-channel norm ratio stays O(1) as m->0; the pv term does NOT cancel the log; violation generic, evaded only on a parity-fine-tuned measure-zero set).
- W1 SELF-CORRECTION (the swarm's adversarial structure worked): W1's claim of quadratic (ml)^2 log^2 suppression via a "THEOREM-grade Dirac-eom chirality-flip suppression" is REFUTED — an artifact of building the flip response O(m)-slaved from a single profile (budget_scaling4.py). W1's proposed edits E1 (amend budget to log^2 — targets a nonexistent paper budget; diamond artifact) and E2 (R-cond state-class restriction — vacuous on the wedge route where k^2=0 kills the channel) are REJECTED and MUST NOT enter the paper.

### ROUTE VERDICT: wedge route genuinely mass-blind AT THE OPERATOR LEVEL, with the hidden catch pinned
- STRONGER than the diamond as advertised: the wedge modular Hamiltonian is EXACTLY the boost 2pi int x^1 T00, mass-independent to all orders (Bisognano-Wichmann; BCM verbatim); no massive modular operator to perturb, no antilocal kernel, no state-class restriction. Mass enters ONLY through the state's renormalized <T_kk> via the Hadamard coefficient v_0 = m^2/2 - (1/6-xi)R — QUADRATIC (the (ml)^2 log(ml) rate, no log^2 tax). Localisation identity d^2/dV^2 int_V^inf (v-V) f dv = f(V) exact and mass-blind (sympy-verified). FLPW eq 14 mass-blind for general relativistic QFT (primary source).
- THE HIDDEN CATCH (both referees; swarm's "budget automatic / strictly stronger" language OVER-READ): the finite-cut modular Hamiltonian on a CURVED background in a general HADAMARD state approaches the flat boost form at a rate that is EXACT only in flat vacuum, SEMICLASSICAL on Killing horizons (Faulkner-Speranza "unable to determine" subleading), QUALITATIVE only (no rate) on generic non-Killing patches. Lu-Wang 2501.02998 / Kudler-Flam 2312.07646 are vacuum/planar/(2+1)d — cited stronger than verified by the swarm; corrected. The RATE is a theorem; the UNIFORMITY of the rate is the gap (= B2-curved).

### THE DECOMPOSITION (the durable structural result):
N1 = [per-point n=1 first law] + [E2a uniformity] + [B1 interacting] + [B2-curved rate], where:
- DIRECTION-UNIFORMITY: PROVEN OUTRIGHT (compact celestial sphere; transverse projector spectrum {0,0,1,1} independent of direction, sympy-verified; 2pi Unruh normalization and 8piG/c^4 SO(n-1)-invariant).

N1-UNIFORMITY REDUCES TO E2A: one named-input family.
- B1 SHARPENED TO A TYPE-MISMATCH (harder than "germ only"): DFP verbatim — the interacting pAQFT net has NO relative modular operator, so "delta S_rel = delta<K> with K modular" is FALSE-BY-TYPE at order n>=1; must be reformulated as the DFP cocycle / relative-free-energy surrogate (a define-the-object problem, structural).

Exhibit |delta<K> - 2pi int_Sigma x^1 delta<T00>_Hadamard| <= C (ml)^2 log(ml) with C UNIFORM in (p,k,g) over the compact scan, free massive d=4 scalar (then Dirac) on the Rindler wedge: Longo exact coherent-state relative entropy + Hadamard v_0 expansion + Sanders constructive constants (E2a iii) + Casini-Grillo-Pontello canonical-stress fixing to quotient the pi D int phi^2 trace piece into the seam. VERDICT: the free-field d=4 scalar wedge estimate |delta<K_wedge> - 2pi int_Sigma x^1 delta<T_00>| <= C [(ml)^2 |log ml| + (l/L_curv)^2] ||delta omega||_* is a THEOREM over {p in K} x S^2 x {single fixed g} UNCONDITIONALLY, and CONDITIONAL on E2a (hyp:hadamard-uniform clause (ii)/(iii) ball-uniformity = LEMMA-II) over {g in Sobolev ball}. Everything else cleared; no rung failed.

C IS FULLY WRITTEN: C = c_{n,s}(K) x [C_mass + C_geo] x kappa_L, with kappa_L = 2pi (Bisognano-Wichmann inverse-Unruh, EXACT); c_{n,s}(K) the Sobolev embedding H^{s-4}(K)->C^0 (s>6, Adams-Fournier); C_mass = 1/2 + (1/m^2) sup_{K x ball} |(xi-1/6)R + [v1-curv]| (Decanini-Folacci d=4); C_geo = the paper's OWN eq:E2-L constant restricted to the patch + boost-deviation term. Every factor finite PER-METRIC in print.

RATE PROVED: (ml)^2 |log ml| from Hadamard v_0 = m^2/2 (quadratic; SINGLE log — sympy log(m^2 l^2)=2 log(ml), no log^2 tax; W1's rejected log^2 not reproduced); (l/L_curv)^2 from RNC + boost deviation. POWER-COUNTING re-verified (sympy): l^4, 2pi, rho cancel between seam error and leading modular energy => the bound is genuinely the RELATIVE error of the equation of state (the wrong-power-of-l silent-error trap cleared). Direction-uniformity proven outright (prior run, re-confirmed).

ANCHOR THEOREMS PULLED AT PRIMARY SOURCE (all verified verbatim):
- Longo "Entropy of Coherent Excitations", LMP 109 (2019) 2587, arXiv:1901.02366 Thm 4.5/5.4: S_rel = pi int x^1 [h^2 + m^2 k^2 + |grad k|^2] EXACT EQUALITY, m>=0, all d. [NOT 1703.10656 — that is Casini-Teste-Torroba null-plane; recipe's guess corrected.]

- Casini-Grillo-Pontello, PRD 99 (2019) 125020, arXiv:1903.00109: improvement ambiguity shifts K by the boundary phi^2 term; positivity+monotonicity FORCE lambda=0 (canonical stress tensor) — the R4 trace-fixing tool. [Recipe's guess 1911.00529 WRONG = Casini-Huerta-Magan-Pontello Maxwell; corrected.]

THE SINGLE OPEN FACTOR (the residual, named): LEMMA-II = the g-continuity/ball-uniformity of the finite-part family {C_W, W_*, D_*, C_D, C_Theta, C_mass curvature-sup} in H^s over the Sobolev ball — i.e. upgrade the fixed-metric finite-regularity parametrix comparison (SobolevWavefront2024/Hintz-Vasy-type) to family-uniform ||W_g - W_g'||_{C^2} <= C_W ||g-g'||_{H^s} with C_W uniform over U. ## R0 PUSH — FINAL ADJUDICATION (run 5): R0 fixed-g WRITTEN at the paper's own fence s>n/2+6=8 (coincidence-jet reading); R1 Lipschitz FAILS AT EVERY s by the plain estimate; flip stays LEDGER-ONLY. Grade UNCHANGED (GENUINELY-OPEN). (10 Opus max agents, 1 StructuredOutput failure covered; both referees GAP-FOUND; adjudicator independently recomputed every number in sympy.)

THE REVERSAL: the prior runs' "R0 needs s>n/2+7=9, re-fence again" is an ARTIFACT — this run's swarm itself uniformly asserted it (A1/A4/B1/B2/B3), and referee-1 caught it as THE internal overclaim (adjudicator confirmed by independent recomputation, crux.py + dstruct.py): they computed the fence for the PURE-SLOT (2,0)/full-C^2 object, but the minimally-coupled (xi=0) point-split operator D forms ONLY the (1,1) CROSS-JET [D W_g](x,x) — every T_munu term distributes one x- with one y-derivative; no pure second-slot derivative exists in the consumer.

R0 (fixed-g sup bound) — WRITTEN at s>8, the paper's existing fence (coincidence-jet reading): d_y-routing chain (sympy-verified): d_y commutes with box_{g,x} (no commutator at single g), so (box_x+m^2)(d_y W) = -(d_y S_g); S_g profile r^2 log r in H^{4-}(x) with coeff box_g v_1 ~ d^6 g in H^{s-6}(x); d_y drops the profile to r log r (H^{3-}); the +1 energy estimate (Kato 1970 Prop 3.4 / Tice Thm 1.2.1 — the estimate HKM 1977 actually CITE, HKM itself is quasilinear existence and proves no linear estimate; provenance verified) gives d_y W in H^{min(s-5,4-)}(x); one d_x gives d_x d_y W in H^{min(s-6,3-)}(x); (1,1)-jet C^0 (Morrey n=4, k>2) iff min(s-6,3-)>2 iff s>8 STRICT. Coincidence value exists and is continuous; joint C^0 by vector-valued continuity (Arendt-Kreuter arXiv:1611.06161). W_* = named finite product at s>8. NO re-fence to n/2+7 (explicitly DO-NOT).

TWO-SLOT VERDICT: survived — via the d_y-routed vector-valued route. The Cauchy-Schwarz/mode-function route DIES on W_g (H_g is a geometric bi-scalar, not an inner product; route-2 vacuous: ||omega^(2)||_C2 = ||H_g||_C2 = +inf, shared 1/sigma pole). The naive iterated H^5(y;H^5(x)) route OVER-DEMANDS the divergent (2,2) jet (sympy: d_x^2 d_y^2 sigma^2 log sigma -> -inf). The correct lemma: joint (1,1)-continuity <=> slot-wise C^1(K_y; C^0(K_x)) + symmetric.

R1 (Lipschitz clause (ii)) — FAILS AT EVERY s with the plain tool (the true residual; CORRECTS the prior ledger claim at the LEMMA-II entry that "R1 reduces to constant-tracking"): D = W_g - W_g' solves the wave equation with commutator source (box_g - box_g')W_g' = (g-g') d_x^2 W_g' + lower — IRREDUCIBLY second-order in x (the two x-derivatives come from box_x, cannot be routed to the spectator slot). The d_y-routed D-source contains the (2,1) jet of W_g': d_x^2 (d_y W_g' in H^{min(s-5,4-)}) -> H^{min(s-7,2-)}(x), profile branch capped at 2- (d_x^2 d_y of r^2 log r ~ r^{-1} log, H^{1-}); the (1,1)-jet of D needs order > 2, i.e. min(s-7, 2-) > 2 — IMPOSSIBLE at every s (2- < 2). R1 has genuine analytic content beyond R0. ROUTE 1 (by-parts / divergence-form) — REFUTED as a full dissolution, with a two-layer verdict on run 5:
- Run 5's MECHANISM ("the d_y-routed source needs the pointwise (2,1) INPUT jet of W_g'") WAS an artifact of source-in-H^{k-1} pointwise bookkeeping — the honest energy method never asks for it; by-parts genuinely reduces the spectator demand, and the H^1 energy Lipschitz bound ||D||_{L^inf_t H^1} <= C_E ||g-g'||_{H^s} IS a theorem at s>8 (plus the |a|+|b|<=1 jets).
- But run 5's CONCLUSION SURVIVES, sharpened: the deficit RELOCATES to the OUTPUT (1,1) jet of D — d_y D in H^{3-}(x) => d_x d_y D in H^{2-}(x), Morrey n=4 needs H^{>2}: ONE full Sobolev order short, s-INDEPENDENTLY. THE JET HEIGHT IS A BY-PARTS INVARIANT (sympy, k=0,1,2 all -> 2-): sliding one d_x off the spectator onto the Green operator turns G_g (order -1, gains +1) into d_x G_g (order 0, gains 0) — the +1 saved is exactly spent. C_W NOT exhibitable at s>8 via Route 1. Also: the +1 wave gain is FORCED by the written R0 (any larger gain would retroactively break R0's own fence — kills the optimistic-artifact direction).

ROUTE 2 (conormal / Hart-Smith / Tataru / Bony-Melrose-Ritter) — NOT WRITABLE standalone or as hybrid at s>8: in-print Strichartz theorems output NORMS not jets (Tataru AJM 122 Thm 3 constant (1+||g||_{C^s}) but bounds L^p L^q); conormal-propagation theorems are C^inf-coefficient + qualitative (no tracked constants, no rough-metric family; Sa Barreto-Wang 1809.09253 Thm 2.6/2.7 verified); and THE CONE VERTEX kills the diagonal jet (sympy: the (2,1) profile (1/u)log|u| is not L^1_loc at the vertex; conormal = tangential smoothness, orthogonal to the transverse-2nd-derivative demand; box_g grazes its own cone but the commutator (g-g')d_x^2 is generic non-characteristic). Contributes at most a supporting lemma.

ROUTE 3 (N=2 subtraction) — THE GENUINE POSITIVE PATH, PLAUSIBLE-modulo-single-paper write-up, closes R1 at s>n/2+9=11 (STRICTLY worse than the current fence s>8; a +3 re-fence): v_2 sigma^2 log sigma lifts the residual profile r^2 log r (H^{4-}) -> r^6 log r (H^{8-}), healing the profile cap 2- -> 4-; the bind shifts to the coeff branch box_g v_2 ~ d^8 g in H^{s-8}; d_x d_y D_2 in H^{min(s-9,4-)}, C^0 iff s>11. C_W = c_Morrey * sqrt(Q e^{PT}) * [c_mult W2_* + C_trans + C_data], every factor named-finite-ball-uniform at s>11 with in-print anchors. N=1.5 NOT feasible as a cost-saver (box_g w ~ d^8 g regenerates the identical coefficient => same s>11). A1's "s>10" = the transport-leg/single-metric sub-fence (necessary-not-sufficient), not R1.
- CITATION CORRECTION (Decanini-Folacci recursion, verified): v_2 ~ d^6 g in H^{s-6} (comfortable at s>11); box_g v_2 ~ d^8 g — the task heuristic "v_2 ~ d^8 g" conflated the coefficient with its box.

THE VERDICT SPLITS BY CODIMENSION (the structural discovery of the run):
- BULK (a), codim-0: the dual-paired bound |int_K f^{munu} A_{munu}^{ab} [d_x^a d_y^b D]_diag dvol| <= C_W^HB ||f||_{H^s} ||g-g'||_{H^s} IS WRITTEN (theorem given the banked imports HB1 = R0 fixed-g coincidence limit, HB2 = H^1 energy-Lipschitz, HB3 = the (0,1)-difference-jet C^0 corollary). IBP identity (exact product rule, no boundary term — supp f interior, codim-4 diagonal carries no delta-mass), trace bridge (dominated convergence rides the C^0 single-slot (0,1) jet, H^{3-}), constant chain — all step-verified by both referees + adjudicator sympy (bulk (1,1) log-pairing 1/32; (0,1) 1/108; (0,0) 1/256; slack integral finite for all a<2).
- SLICE (b), codim-1 (the consumer lem:E2-energy-lipschitz integrates the 00-jet over Sigma): FAILED AS PACKAGED, REDUCED. A_00^{00} = 1/2 != 0, so T_00 genuinely contains the BOTH-NORMAL mixed jet (the pi^2 canonical-momentum term). The both-tangential part disposes by tangential Stokes IBP (fine); the both-normal part has NO tangential integration variable for the normal x-derivative and the consumer smears over a single time-slice (no t-IBP available) — the H^{2-} dead jet reappears exactly where it cannot be smeared away. Dual pairing vs phi in H^1(Sigma) fails from H^1-energy alone (needs pi_D^2 in L^{6/5}; HB2 gives only L^1; L^1 not in L^{6/5}). Finiteness (R0 x2) gives a CONSTANT bound, not the rate.
- EXACT MISSING INEQUALITY (HB4): ||D||_{L^inf_t H^2(Sigma_t)} <= C_E^{(2)}(g_0) ||g-g'||_{H^s} at s>8 — the H^2-energy-Lipschitz estimate for D, ONE Sobolev order above the banked HB2, applied to the commutator source (g-g') d_x^2 W_{g'}. Given HB4: pi_D in H^1(Sigma_3) -> L^6 => pi_D^2 in L^3 subset L^2(Sigma), closing (b) a fortiori. PLAUSIBLE at s>8 by the derivative budget (source traces to H^{3/4}(Sigma), no re-fence) BUT it is the irreducible commutator estimate flagged since run 5 — must be WRITTEN, not assumed.

THE NINTH OVERCLAIM (9-for-9, optimistic, internal contradiction): the assembly packaged slice (b) as "THEOREM modulo (HB1-HB3)" while its own rem:HB-L2-gap declared the very inequality (b) needs to "cost no consumer." (F2 majorant challenge partially wrong — the (0,1) difference jet IS C^0; only the "cleared/elementary" B20 wording overstated.)

FINITENESS REFRAMING (H2): CORRECT and verified — R0-per-metric gives L^2 finiteness immediately (no codim-4 subtlety; R0 already restricted the fixed-g jet to the diagonal continuously); the RATE is the only new content. W1's 30/30 re-runs PASS but V4a tests only the 1D-ALIGNED phase (in 1D, e.(x-y) = +-|x-y| — the flaw needs >= 2 dims); the internal-consistency defense ("naive count would break referee-confirmed R0") is CIRCULAR: run-5's crux.py (re-read) booked d_y via the profile only and NEVER formed the T2 coefficient term (d_y box v_1)Pi — the banked layer carried the same silent half-order.

Hence (D3)=PLAUSIBLE => (D1)/(D4)/(D5)/T1'-Main=PLAUSIBLE; the assembler PICKED THE CORRECT ROUTE (B stitched as device, A banked as negative). (b) beta=1/2 GENUINELY PROVED (adjudicator re-ran gate_beta2.py): affine-Plancherel identity beta=(order of vanishing of F=J*w at t=1)+1/2 reproduces 0.497/1.497/2.497/3.497 for orders 0/1/2/3 EXACTLY, J(1)=1 exact algebraic identity (d/dy[gamma_{x,y}(1)]=d/dy[y]=Id => J(1)=|e^T|=1), w(1)!=0 class-permitted (only w(0)=0 imposed), bend-insensitive (q(1)=0 fixes F(1)); S4a introduces NO second independent downgrade.     MINIMAX min_a max(A,B) = 1/2 at a=1 (= S3a's OWN mu_*=(Lam rho)^{-1}); both cells then [+1/2, .. , ..]. Numeric regression slopes +0.5000 / +0.5000.

    (B) bad set    : [Lam^{+1/2}, rho^{+3/2}, kbar2^{0}]    OVERSHOOT  <== canonical failing cell (kbar2^0, off the rho^{-1} column by rho^{+5/2})

THE THREE LEVERS ALL FAIL FOR ONE REASON (conservation), each independently PINNED:
  (1) shell-cut re-optimization mu_*: conservation forbids joint closure (sum=1, minimax +1/2).
  (2) branch-split (mu vs rho*mu^{1/2}): the mu-branch lands the bad set [Lam^0, rho^0, ..] BUT is INADMISSIBLE there — mu_*<rho^2 => the max() returns the SQRT value, and the mu-branch value there IS the linear form = PLAUSIBLE.
  (3) two-scale split: the sqrt-branch layer-cake integrand ~ m^{-3/2} is LOWER-LIMIT dominated (int_{mu_1}^1 m^{-3/2}dm ~ mu_1^{-1/2}); any split scale mu_1 drops out of the optimum — no gain. (Linear integrand m^{-1} -> log, bounded by O(1) cell count -> Lam^0; the gap IS the missing half-power of m.)
  CAP-VALIDITY FENCE (pins the cut, disjoint windows): cap-valid needs mu_* <= (Lam rho)^{-1}; vdC-II-on-bad needs mu_* >= 2^11/(Lam K)=2^11 Lam^{-1} kbar2^{-1} rho^{-2}; window ratio = 2^11/(kbar2 rho) = 40960 (Lam-INDEPENDENT, verified 3 decades; kbar2 rho <= kappa_b = O(1)). DISJOINT => the bad set is cap-ONLY (vdC-II there has amp^2/cap^2 = 2^10/(kbar2 rho) > 1) => a=1 forced. ORIGIN of the deficit: shell amp^2~1/(Lam m) needs measure ~ m^{+1} to cancel; sqrt supplies m^{+1/2}; the missing HALF-POWER of m, at the pinned deep scale mu_*~Lam^{-1}, IS exactly Lam^{+1/2}. No branch/cut/split manufactures a half-power of m. THE NEGATIVE IS THEOREM-GRADE FOR THE NAMED-LEVER CLASS (shell cut a,c free; cell boundaries; branch assignment; two-scale splits — the full parameter space the task named). The only escape would be a NEW THEOREM-grade sublevel measure strictly between rho*mu^{1/2} and the linear c_sub*mu; none exists — the linear form is the unique closer and it is PLAUSIBLE.

## RUN 14 — NEW DEVICE CLASS SCOUT — FINAL ADJUDICATION: SIX ANGLES ALL DEAD; NO PROOF TARGET WORTH A RUN; THE TERMINUS STANDS (run 14, 2026-07-10, Opus scout: six generators A1-A6 + two hostile gates + this adjudicator who RE-DERIVED the conservation law from scratch and RE-RAN every decisive numeric himself — not importing the generators' expressions — ran his OWN two adversarial probes, hunted #19, and ls-verified the staged corpus). SCOPE: this run answers 13e AUTHOR'S OPTION (2) — "open a new device class outside the count-free/linear dichotomy" — by scouting six candidate device classes. RESULT: **all six reduce to the certified-dead ball-uniform fold-branch count N_0; NONE is worth a proof run; the naive (c+1,p-1) PERMANENT TERMINUS (run 13e) STANDS UNCHANGED.** This is a full-value outcome (a genuine none-verdict, not a manufactured target); the naive-row close-out remains the only path to the flip. BOTH gates CONFIRMED (high confidence), adjudicator-reproduced.

THE UNIFYING TEST (adjudicator re-derived FROM SCRATCH, hostile_conservation.py, independent of gate_s3c_decision.py; reproduced bit-for-bit). For ANY count-free sublevel measure P(mu)=rho^alpha mu^beta feeding the two failing cells (deep vdC-II shell amp^2=2^9 D^2 b^2/(Lam mu_* K) + bad-set cap cap^2=(b/2)^2, shared free cut mu_*=Lam^{-a}rho^{-c}): Lam-exp(A)=a(1-beta), Lam-exp(B)=1-a*beta; d/da[SUM]=1-2beta so the sum is cut-INDEPENDENT (=1) ONLY at beta=1/2 (the proved branch); the MINIMAX over the cut = 1-beta (beta=1/2->+1/2 FAILS, beta=3/4->+1/4, beta=1->0 CLOSES). **So EVERY new-device angle must, after unfolding, supply a count-free sublevel measure with beta>=1 (equivalently a ball-uniform N_0); nothing weaker closes the deep cell.** TWO independent facts foreclose this, both adjudicator-reproduced on his OWN families: (i) beta=1/2 is the count-free CEILING AND a STRUCTURAL MAXIMUM over fold order — MY adj_higherfold.py: a single A_k critical point gives sublevel exponent beta=1/k <= 1/2 (k=2:0.500, k=3:0.321, k=4:0.226, k=6:0.133), so a DEGENERATE higher-order critical point makes beta SMALLER not larger; the simple A_2 fold is the true max. (ii) N_0 is UNBOUNDED over U — MY re-run gate_ripple_refute.py (ripple g=diag(1,1+a sin(N z1)), a=(1/2)eps0 N^{-11}: Z=2,3,6,12,24,49,98,196 for N=20..2560, slope 1.008, a*N^s PINNED 0.25<eps0 in-ball) AND MY hostile_worstcase_beta.py O(1)-bend A=0.45 (Z=2,4,8,15,31,61 slope +0.984; honest sublevel measure beta~1.01 BOUNDED but the count-free provable ceiling = per-piece vdC x (1+Z) ~ N blows up). The GAP between the bounded honest measure (beta=1, F3) and the provable count-free ceiling (beta=1/2, F1) IS N_0 (F2), refuted at THEOREM grade on multiple in-ball families.

## RUN 15 — THE REAL-ANALYTICITY PROGRAM — FINAL ADJUDICATION: N_0 IS A THEOREM OVER U_omega; THE CASCADE IS THEOREM ON THE FOLD STRATUM N_{m0} ONLY (PLAUSIBLE end-to-end over U_omega — W2 over-consumes N_0 on V_{m0}\{≡0}); CONSUMERS ALL ANALYTIC-SAFE; THE FLIP IS ONE FINITE DOWNSTREAM CHECK AWAY (run 15, 2026-07-10, Opus swarm: 4 writers W1-N0/W2-cascade/W3-consumers/W4-S1transfer + 2 hostile gates + this adjudicator who re-ran the crossing/strip-sup/D3/Vm0-binding/final-audit gates himself, re-derived the W2-vs-W1 scope mismatch, verified the App.E2 structural finding + the 22-token count against unification.tex verbatim, and hunted #20 across the seams). SCOPE: this run executes 13e/14 AUTHOR'S OPTION (2) — "a FRESH regularity theorem exporting the ball-uniform fold count N_0 that no (R)-item supplies" — via real-analyticity. RESULT: **the object N_0 IS recovered over an analytic ball U_omega at THEOREM grade (the terminus's named obstruction is DISCHARGED on the fold stratum); the end-to-end cascade over U_omega is PLAUSIBLE, gapped at exactly one downstream weigh-in (the near-flat V_{m0} sliver at the binding cut), which all numerics support but no writer proves; the consumer side is fully ANALYTIC-SAFE (no dense-vs-open false discharge).** This is a genuine ADVANCE over the run-13e/14 terminus (which was PLAUSIBLE with the count REFUTED at finite C^k); it is NOT yet a flip. BOTH gates CONFIRMED (high confidence), adjudicator-reproduced.

THE FRAMEWORK (Def an-Uomega, W1). U_omega(g_0,rho_a,eps_a) = {g holomorphic on the complex collar K_{rho_a} of K'', ||g-g_0||_{collar-sup} < eps_a}, g_0 real-analytic. EMBEDDING (Lem an-embed): ||g-g_0||_{H^s} <= C_emb ||g-g_0||_{collar}, C_emb = C_cw(1+rho_a^{-s})|K''|^{1/2} by Cauchy estimates; so eps_a <= eps_0/C_emb gives U_omega SUBSET U and ALL S1a/S1b/S1c/S2 exports (R1-R5, F2, S2-0, D2) transfer verbatim with U-constants. Pinned by exactly three data (rho_a,eps_a,g_0); NO Sobolev index, NO C^k norm enters N_0 — the whole gain over U.

N_0 VERDICT: **THEOREM over U_omega** (Lem an-N0 / Lem N0-analytic, W1). N_0(rho_a,eps_a,g_0) = ceil(4/r_t)(1 + log(R_0)/log(3/sqrt2)), r_t = min(1/4, rho_a/(16 M_Gamma c_ch rho_0)), R_0 = M_phi''/m_0. Proof = tile [0,1] into ceil(4/r_t) tiles of length r_t/4, per-tile Jensen centred at the strip-sup point (value >= m_0 by the PER-TILE floor), outer disc R=3r_t/4 (in-strip), inner r=sqrt2 r_t/4 (covers tile's real zeros), ratio 3/sqrt2. The strip-sup bound M_phi''=4 M_Gamma c_ch^2 rho^2 is taken DIRECTLY from phi''=-e.Gamma(gamma')(gamma') (the rho-HONEST O(rho^2) bound, NOT the lossy O(1) Cauchy bound), so the Jensen ratio R_0 is rho-BOUNDED (~ rho_0^2/rho_min^2 <= 9), not blowing up as rho->0.
  THE GATE'S OSCILLATION-WITHIN-ANALYTICITY ATTACK FIRES ON THE RAW COUNT — AND W1 SURVIVES IT HONESTLY (adjudicator reproduced gate_crossing.py + gate_strip_sup.py). Driving the ball-EDGE ripple g=diag(1,1+a sin(K z1)), a->0 at mode K=arccosh(eps_a/a)/rho_a (collar-norm pinned = eps_a, IN U_omega), the GENUINE analytic zero count of phi'' on [0,1] is Z ~ K rho/pi = log(eps_a/a)*(rho/rho_a)/pi -> +infinity (Z=1,3,6,10,14,21,...,113 as a:1e-2->1e-160; amplitude-INDEPENDENT, confirmed by a high-precision linearized count immune to float underflow — Z grows LINEARLY in K, these are real zeros of the analytic phi'', not noise). Meanwhile the writers' N_0 FORMULA saturates to its floor ceil(4/r_t)=16 as a->0 (because M_Gamma ~ 0.5 eps_a K e^{-K rho_a/2} -> 0, so r_t -> 1/4 and R_0 < 1 kills the log term). So the RAW fold count over U_omega is UNBOUNDED and DOES scale with log(amplitude ratio) — **N_0's formula degenerates as amplitude->0 (this IS the program's residual ripple; stated plainly).** W1 is NOT refuted because these divergent-Z families have complex-STRIP-sup(phi'') -> 0 (verified: strip_sup = 1.6e-4..6e-16 << m_0 = 5e-4 for a<=1e-4) and LAND IN V_{m0}, exactly the stratum where Lem an-N0's PER-TILE floor is NOT met and the count is DISCLAIMED. The strip-sup NEVER exceeds the writers' uniform bound M_phi''=285.5 (so Prop an-strip is NOT violated by any in-ball metric). The gate's headline "Z=21 > N_0_floor=16" compares Z against the SATURATED formula value on families that are in V_{m0}, where W1 does not count — so it does NOT falsify Lem an-N0. RIPPLE EXCLUSION itself (collar norm = a cosh(K rho_a) -> +inf; first-excluded N_*=252 at rho_a=0.25,eps_a=1) is a clean THEOREM: exp beats poly, the C^k refuter cannot enter the analytic class.

CASCADE STATUS: **THEOREM on the fold stratum N_{m0} (and for mu>=kappa_V everywhere); PLAUSIBLE end-to-end over U_omega — gated at ONE downstream check. W2's prop:an-D3 "THEOREM over U_omega modulo (N0-an)" IS AN OVERCLAIM (gate (c), CONFIRMED); honest grade PLAUSIBLE.** The mismatch, adjudicator-verified line-by-line:
  - W1 cor:an-split (t1p_an_N0.tex l.610-702) is SCRUPULOUSLY HONEST: it splits B_nd = B_N (fibre in N_{m0}) ⊔ B_V (fibre in V_{m0}) and proves the PURE linear form d_theta(S_mu)<=c_sub mu ONLY on B_N and for mu>=kappa_V on B_V, with a count-free mu^{1/2} REMAINDER (C_sub rho mu^{1/2}) for mu<kappa_V on B_V.   - W2 thm:an-linear (t1p_an_cascade.tex l.223-236) claims d_theta(S_mu)<=c_sub mu for ALL mu>0 at THEOREM grade, and its lem:an-degenerate (l.167-197) splits ONLY B_deg={phi''≡0} vs B_nd={phi''≢0}, then applies (N0-an) on ALL of B_nd (l.243-248). But (N0-an) is NOT valid on all of B_nd — only on N_{m0} ⊊ B_nd. The gap stratum V_{m0}\{≡0} (near-vanishing but nonzero phi'', positive measure — exactly where the low-amplitude ripples live) is INSIDE B_nd but OUTSIDE N_{m0}. W2 NEVER mentions kappa_V, V_{m0}, or the mu^{1/2} remainder (grep-verified: zero occurrences in t1p_an_cascade.tex). So W2 applies the count on a strictly larger set than W1 proved it — a genuine over-consumption.
  - LOAD-BEARING? The binding (D3) cut is mu_* = (Lam rho)^{-1} -> 0 < kappa_V = m_0/(kbar_2 rho^2) = O(1) (at Lam=1e4,rho=0.3: mu_*=3.3e-4 < kappa_V=5.6e-3), so the V_{m0} remainder is nominally ACTIVE at the scale where the terminus deficit lived.   - NUMERICS STRONGLY SUPPORT the weigh-in closing (adjudicator reproduced gate_Vm0_binding.py, gate_D3_ripple.py, gate_final_audit.py — ALL show the near-flat/ripple stratum closes (D3) at TARGET, not the overshoot): (i) near-flat quadratic + degenerate-A3 model phases in V_{m0} give int|I|^2 dtheta ~ mass*Lam const (slope ~ -1), and mass*sqrtLam DECAYING (better than Lam^{-1/2}); (ii) the actual device integral on the ball-edge ripple family (a=1e-3..1e-10, Z~3..9 folds) closes at mass*Lam const then STEEPER than -1 (mass*Lam 6.77->1.02; mass*sqrtLam 0.39->0.003) — the exp-tiny amplitude makes the folds invisible to |I_Lam|; (iii) a GENUINE O(1) analytic Lorentzian bump at the ball edge (real fold, NOT amplitude-suppressed) closes at mass*Lam~7.1 const (slope -1). So V_{m0} very plausibly closes by the flat-layer route (out i), but that is a FINITE DOWNSTREAM S3a/S3b CHECK, not proved in this run. ### AUDIT-TREE SUMMARY (the governing structural fact, adjudicator-confirmed against ISSUES.md l.4480-4614 + the files).
The staged analytic chain does NOT prove Hyp. hyp:hadamard-uniform-omega's clauses (i)/(ii)/(iii). It proves a DIFFERENT object: the analytic slice register over the class U_omega. The clauses are the named INPUTS (E2a-omega) CONSUMED by thm:E2-Lipschitz / prop:N1-free-omega (paper l.17236 ff), not derived by any companion file. This matches the ledger's own THE-FLIP status (l.4608-4612): the paper still carries E2a as a restated (analytic-collar) HYPOTHESIS; the companion chain is referee-confirmed THEOREM end-to-end over U_omega in the research record; PUBLISHING that chain is the remaining step. THIS APPENDIX IS THAT PUBLICATION. Two-part master theorem thm:an17:E2a-omega-main (fragment l.3680-3746): Part (A) UNCONDITIONAL over U_omega (the slice chain, four sub-clauses A1-A4 each citing a THEOREM-grade node); Part (B) the fused free-massive-scalar first law = THEOREM-MODULO {M1,M2,M3} with M1/M2/M3 stated as EXPLICIT named in-hypothesis clauses (l.3720-3733) and the proof block (l.3772-3777) declaring them NOT discharged. Title: "Analytic slice register over U_omega, and the first-law extraction modulo the Hadamard/QEI clauses" — NEVER "E2a-omega is a theorem" (that string appears in the fragment ONLY in comments l.1813/3499 and the correctly-negated master-label sentence l.3889 "is a theorem MODULO the finite ...").
