## THE THREE ARMS + THREE KILLS — GRADED

### A1 (L2, the conformal modular-energy bound) — PARTIAL / DEMOTED
- Longo Thm 5.4 (EXACT, all d, m>=0): S_rel = pi int_{x1>0} x1 [h^2 + m^2 k^2 + |grad k|^2].
  As m->0 the m^2 k^2 term DROPS; the massless modular energy is pi int x1 [h^2+|grad k|^2],
  finite/positive for smooth compact data. NO 1/m, NO IR divergence. (mm_refute.py A1, 4/4.)
- THIS KILLS the "1/m is a genuine IR singularity" reading: the 1/m of eq:E2-CS is the
  MASSIVE one-particle SPECTRAL GAP inf_k sqrt(k^2+m^2)=m; the CFT is gapless (inf_k|k|=0)
  yet the modular energy is finite. The gap was an ARTIFACT of the massive one-particle
  bottom, not a property of the modular data. PROVER-STRENGTHENING (as run-37 already
  showed for the first law: the boost energy ~|k| is IR-finite).
- BUT (the honest gap): Longo bounds the ENERGY (= rel entropy). eq:E2-CS bounds a DIFFERENT
  object: tr|i coth(K_d/2) - i coth(K_0/2)| and ||cosh^{-1}(K/2)||_HS^2, the trace-norm of a
  COTH-DIFFERENCE. Near the spectral bottom coth(K/2)~2/K, derivative ~ -2/K^2 IR-singular;
  the trace-norm sensitivity to the IR spectral density near K=0 is NOT controlled by the
  |k|-weighted energy. (mm_refute.py A1b, 2/2: coth(K/2)~2/K; K^2 d/dK coth = -2.)
- AND it is the SCALAR (Longo/CLR = KG); the 4d-transverse-Maxwell instance is the run-37
  first-law object (separate, mass-independent), not this energy bound.
- GRADE A1 = PARTIAL. Demotes the obstruction from "IR singularity" to "missing 3+1d Maxwell
  trace-class estimate + wrong functional." L2 STAYS NAMED-OPEN, sharpened. The massless
  replacement needs a genuinely new coth-trace bound (CFM 2312.04629 = 2d fermion, verified;
  ChialastriSanders = m>0 ultrastatic — neither is 3+1d massless Maxwell).

### A2 (L4, the conformal QEI/QNEC) — CLEAN KILL (kill iii)
- FLPW 1605.08072: modular-H shape-deriv = int of NULL T_kk along the Rindler HORIZON => ANEC.
- Ceyhan-Faulkner 1812.04683: QNEC from ANE (averaged NULL energy), HSMI + finite-ANE.
- Both NULL-averaged on a null line. eq:E2-QEI (Sanders2024) differs on 3 axes:
  (A) TIMELIKE-timelike T_tt not null T_kk; (B) SPACETIME-SMEARED open ball not null line;
  (C) CONDITIONED-SOURCE floor (eq:E2-conditioned-floor), ball-uniform — the framework's
  special strengthening. (mm_refute.py iii, 3/3 axes differ.)
- ANEC (int T_kk>=0) does NOT lower-bound the ball-smeared int T_tt (squeezed/Casimir configs
  saturate ANEC with negative timelike-smeared energy). Null-positivity orthogonal to the floor.
- The paper ALREADY (l.17363-83) uses Ceyhan-Faulkner for the SEPARATE null leg via rel-entropy
  monotonicity NOT a QEI, and records FewsterRoman2003 (no state-indep null bound, free
  massless d=4). So the conformal null tool structurally CANNOT be the timelike ball-uniform QEI.
- GRADE A2 = CLEAN KILL. The claim "conformal QNEC supplies L4" is FALSE. L4 STAYS HARD GAP,
  unchanged. Missing ingredient NAMED: spacetime-smeared, ball-uniform, timelike-contracted
  Maxwell QEI with conditioned-source floor (Sanders-type lifted to massless Maxwell).

### A3 (the anomaly + curvature obstruction) — kills (i) + (ii)

KILL (ii) NON-CONFORMALLY-FLAT — CLEAN KILL of the curved reach:
- L3 seam: E_seam = (ml)^2|log(ml)|*C_mass, C_mass=1/2+(1/m^2)Q_curv. Power (ml)^2*(1/m^2)=l^2
  cancels; the (1/2)-piece ->0; the Q-piece l^2 Q|log(ml)| -> +oo unless Q_curv=0.
  (mm_refute.py ii: Q-piece == |log m| EXACTLY at m=1e-1..1e-24, reproduces ISSUES l.9328.)
- MAXWELL SUBTLETY (decisive): conformal coupling removes the (xi-1/6)R piece ONLY. The
  Hadamard v1 (Decanini-Folacci, d=4 conformal) STILL contains WEYL^2 = C_abcd C^abcd, which
  does NOT vanish at conformal coupling. So Q_curv ~ |Weyl^2| + Ricci, nonzero off Petrov type O.
- Schwarzschild: R=0, R_mn=0 (Ricci-flat) BUT Kretschmann = Weyl^2 = 48 G^2 M^2/r^6 != 0,
  Petrov type D, NOT conformally flat. Kerr likewise type D. So the R-based rescue MISSES:
  Q_curv ~ Weyl^2 survives, |log(ml)| GENUINELY OBSTRUCTS. (mm_refute.py ii, 5/5.)
- GRADE (ii) = CLEAN KILL of curved reach. The conformal L3 rescue is a conformally-flat
  (type O)/flat-space artifact; fails on exactly the BH backgrounds the framework needs.

KILL (i) TRACE-ANOMALY — CONFIRMED-BUT-NARROW (does not independently kill; SEALS ii):
- 4d Maxwell trace anomaly <T^mu_mu> = a E_4 + c W^2, c-number, STATE-INDEPENDENT, curvature-local
  (photon a=-31/180, c=-1/10, Duff norm). Does it enter the BOUND or only <T>?
- A QEI bounds the TIMELIKE-TIMELIKE T_tt, NOT the trace. Decompose T_tt = traceless +
  (1/d)(t.t)T^mu_mu; the anomaly (a trace shift) enters T_tt only via (1/d)(t.t)<T>_anom, a
  STATE-INDEPENDENT c-number curvature shift of the FLOOR c_S. It carries NO 1/m and does NOT
  diverge as m->0 (the anomaly is a CURVATURE scale ~c W^2, not a mass scale). (mm_refute.py i, 2/2.)
- MATCHES the paper's own logic: l.7154-57 "the anomaly affects the TRACE ONLY; conservation is
  EXACT"; l.19369-77 the anomaly carried as a SEPARATE additive c-number A^even_grav=aE_4+cW^2 in
  the Clausius identity, not inside dK_omega.
- SO the sharpest refuter clause (i) — "the anomaly IS a mass-like scale reintroducing the gap"
  — is FALSE: curvature scale, not mass scale; enters the floor, not the state-dependent bound.
- The TRUE force of (i): it breaks the EXACTNESS of the CFT modular structure on curved bg. The
  exactly-known Casini-Huerta/FLPW modular H is FLAT (Minkowski); on curved bg it holds only
  after a Weyl map to a conformally-related frame, which EXISTS iff type O. So (i) FUSES with (ii):
  the CFT modular data is exact ONLY on the type-O locus, empty for the BHs.
- GRADE (i) = CONFIRMED-BUT-NARROW. Does not independently kill (the anomaly does not reintroduce
  a mass scale into the bound), but seals (ii): "exactly-known conformal modular H" is exact only
  where the background is conformally flat.

## CONFORMAL RESCUE REACH, BY BACKGROUND (the honest map)
- Minkowski / conformally flat (type O, R=0, Weyl=0): Q_curv=0, seam |log| vanishes, CFT
  modular data EXACT, anomaly a fixed c-number. L3 RESCUE HOLDS. (L2 still energy-only; L4 null-only.)
- Schwarzschild / Kerr (type D, R=0 BUT Weyl!=0): Q_curv ~ Weyl^2 != 0, seam |log(ml)| DIVERGES,
  CFT modular data NOT exact (no global Weyl map to flat). CONFORMAL RESCUE FAILS. (The needed bg.)
- FRW / de Sitter (conformally flat, type O, Weyl=0, R!=0): (xi-1/6)R piece absent for Maxwell
  (conformal) AND Weyl=0 => Q_curv leading pieces vanish; L3 RESCUE HOLDS, CFT modular data EXACT
  (Maxwell on conformally-flat FRW = genuine Weyl transform of Minkowski). Anomaly a E_4 c-number.

## NET VERDICT (the refuter's headline)
TWO CLEAN KILLS + ONE CONFIRMED PARTIAL RESCUE:
  - CLEAN KILL (iii): conformal QNEC/ANEC does NOT supply the L4 spacetime-smeared ball-uniform
    conditioned-source QEI (null-averaged, wrong contraction/support/form). L4 HARD GAP unchanged.
  - CLEAN KILL (ii)+(i): the conformal L2/L3 rescue is a conformally-flat (type O) artifact; on
    the physical BH backgrounds (Petrov D) the seam |log(ml)| survives (Weyl^2 in v1) and the CFT
    modular data is not exact. The rescue fails on exactly the backgrounds the framework needs.
  - CONFIRMED PARTIAL RESCUE (strengthens the provers): the massless modular ENERGY is IR-finite
    (Longo exact, no 1/m) — the 1/m of eq:E2-CS is a spectral-gap artifact, NOT an IR singularity.
    But this bounds the energy, not the coth-trace object; L2 DEMOTED, not closed.

The RUN-38 THESIS ("the conformal structure closes the massless-Maxwell hard half") is REFUTED
for the CURVED physical backgrounds. The honest residual is UNCHANGED IN KIND (L2 named-open,
L4 hard gap), SHARPENED IN STATEMENT: L2 = missing 3+1d Maxwell coth-trace estimate (not an IR
divergence); L4 = missing timelike ball-uniform conditioned-source Maxwell QEI (not a null one);
the conformal rescue of L3 = conformally-flat/FRW locus only, dead on Schwarzschild/Kerr.

## HONESTY (#45's three presumed homes — CONFRONTED)
(a) "conformal modular structure asserted EXACT while the trace anomaly breaks it": CONFRONTED.
    The anomaly quantified — c-number curvature shift of the floor, NO 1/m (kill i); AND the
    exactness explicitly restricted to type O (the exactly-known modular H is flat/Minkowski).
    NOT asserted exact on curved bg.
(b) "flat/conformally-flat result cited for the CURVED physical backgrounds": CONFRONTED. The
    |log| survival off the type-O locus is EXHIBITED per background (Schwarzschild/Kerr type D,
    Weyl^2!=0; FRW/dS type O, rescue holds). Every background's conformal class stated. NOT glossed.
(c) "conformal QNEC/ANEC conflated with the conditioned-source ball-uniform QEI": CONFRONTED and
    REFUSED. The 3-axis difference (contraction/support/form) exhibited; the paper's own use of
    Ceyhan-Faulkner for the SEPARATE null leg noted. They are different-strength objects; the
    framework needs the stronger, which no conformal result supplies.

## DO-NOT COMPLIANCE
NO fitted factors (every number reproduces a stated formula: Longo Thm 5.4, ISSUES l.9328 seam,
Schwarzschild Kretschmann, coth expansion). NO massive-window smuggling (A1 uses the m->0 limit of

## THE TWO A3 DANGERS, QUANTIFIED (#45 homes (a) and (b))

### A3.a -- DOES THE TRACE ANOMALY ENTER THE BOUND OR ONLY <T>? [THEOREM-grade]
FINDING: the anomaly enters the EXPECTATION only; it CANCELS in every
DIFFERENCE the E2 chain is built from, and does NOT enter the BOUND.
Mechanism (each in print, reproduced symbolically Group/Block A,B):
  (F1) <T^mu_mu> = c W^2 - a E_4 is a STATE-INDEPENDENT c-number local
       curvature functional [Brown-Cassidy PRD 15 2810 (1977); tex l.19377].
       Maxwell coeffs a=62/360=31/180, c=12/120=1/10, a/c=31/18 [Duff77/CD78]
       (VERIFIED sympy; convention-free ratio). Paper's v_1-form
       g^munu<T>=-v_1/4pi^2 [Wald78, tex l.7155].
  (F2) PURE-TRACE: "the anomaly affects the trace only; conservation is exact"
       [Wald78, tex l.7157]. The E2 bounds control the TIMELIKE-TIMELIKE
       component <T_munu t^mu t^nu>; the anomaly sits in (1/4)g_munu T^a_a,
       contributing a state-indep (1/4)(t.t)A_anom that CANCELS in differences.
  (F3) The vacuum modular AUTOMORPHISM (BW/Tomita-Takesaki geometric boost)
       is a property of the vacuum+net, NOT of <T^mu_mu> -- INTACT at one loop.
       The generator K=2pi int x^1 T_00 and its shape deformation 2pi int T_vv
       are STRESS-TENSOR OPERATORS with NO additive anomaly c-number
       [Faulkner-Leigh-Parrikar-Wang JHEP 09(2016)038, 1605.08072].
       => S_rel = Delta<K> never acquires an anomaly constant.
PROP (anom-cancel, mm_anomaly.tex): <T>_A - <T>_0 = S(omega_A)-S(omega_0),
  A_anom drops out of trace AND tt-component differences. Elementary once
  (F1)-(F3) granted; each in print. VERIFIED sympy (3 cancellation checks).
REFUTER (i) [anomaly = mass-like scale in the bound]: MISSES. True of the
  EXPECTATION (physical Casimir/anomaly energy), FALSE of the BOUND (invisible
  to differences). The anomaly is curvature^2; the surviving curvature
  obstruction (A3.b) is a DIFFERENT, first-order-in-curvature-scale object.

### A3.b -- THE |log(m l)| OFF THE CONFORMALLY-FLAT LOCUS [PARTIAL]
FINDING: L3 rescue tracks the WEYL (conformal) class, NOT flatness. Power
rescued universally; whole seam rescued on conformally-flat locus; |log(ml)|
SURVIVES on Petrov-D physical black holes.
Seam (ISSUES l.4077/4065, Decanini-Folacci v_1):
  E_seam = c_{n,s} kappa_L (ml)^2 |log(ml)| C_mass, C_mass=1/2 + Q_curv/m^2,
  Q_curv := sup|(xi-1/6)R + [v1-curv]|  (mass-INDEPENDENT curvature).
SYMBOLIC (Block D, 6/6 PASS):
  - gap piece (1/2)(ml)^2|log| -> 0 as m->0  (power beats log; naive half OK)
  - curv piece l^2 Q_curv |log(ml)| -> +oo as m->0 for Q_curv>0
    (power (ml)^2*(1/m^2)=l^2 cancels, LOG SURVIVES); coeff-checked = Q_curv l^2|log|
  - curv piece VANISHES IDENTICALLY at Q_curv=0; FULL seam -> 0 (rescue complete)
  - seam FINITE at fixed m>0 (no divergence at physical mass); only sup_{m->0} diverges
CONFORMAL-CLASS MAP (Block E, verified against GR lit this run):
  Q_curv=0 <=> conformally flat (C_{munurhosigma}=0), up to removable box-R.
  RESCUED (4): Minkowski, de Sitter (static patch), FRW (any a(t)),
    interior Schwarzschild (uniform rho) -- all C=0.
  OBSTRUCTED (3): Schwarzschild exterior, Kerr, Kerr-(A)dS -- Petrov D, C!=0.
  => the framework's admissible-background list (tex l.17098/17301) STRADDLES
     the locus: cosmological members (dS/FRW) rescued; BH members (Schw/Kerr) not.
SECOND, STRUCTURAL LIMITATION (from the Block-C CHM-locality analysis): the
  Casini-Huerta CLOSED-FORM "ball modular H = LOCAL 2pi int w T_00" rests on the
  conformal map diamond->Rindler (conformally-flat construction; CHM state it
  for a round sphere). Off the conformally-flat locus that map is absent, so the
  local weight w=(R^2-r^2)/2R is flat/conf-flat-special and K acquires NON-LOCAL
  corrections (Casini-Teste-Torroba-type). The first law S_rel=Delta<K> still
  holds ABSTRACTLY (run-37 BW+BCDV, weight-free), but the CS-form LOCAL modular-
  energy estimate is conf-flat-only. Same frontier from a second direction.
ABSORBABLE? On type-D, NOT into a finite CS-form constant, but BOUNDED not
  fatal: |log| multiplies FIXED l^2 (no wrong-power-of-l trap); finite at each
  fixed m>0; only strict massless m->0 loses the CS constant. As a RELATIVE
  error of the equation of state ~ |log(ml)|, unbounded m->0 at fixed l.
REFUTER (ii) [non-conf-flat kill; rescue = flat artifact]: LANDS on type-D
  (Schw/Kerr: |log| survives, CS-form eq:E2-CS unavailable in strict m->0), but
  OVERREACHES on "flat artifact" -- dS/FRW are CURVED (R!=0) yet C=0 and FULLY
  rescued. Honest statement: rescue tracks conformal class, not flatness.

### A3.c -- CONFORMAL QNEC/ANEC vs eq:E2-QEI [HARD GAP unchanged]
FINDING: conformal null-energy objects strictly weaker than the conditioned-
source ball-uniform QEI on >=3 axes (Block F, structural, 1/1 PASS):

  Fewster-Pfenning         Y        .       .         .         Y

  SPACETIME-SMEARED conformal QEI (Fewster-Smith-type extension) -- the A2-arm
  question, NOT the null-averaged conformal inequalities ruled out here.

## THE HONEST REACH (A3 deliverable)
Two curvature scales, disentangled (the central A3 result):
  - trace anomaly c W^2 - a E_4 (curvature^2, c-number, in the EXPECTATION):
    CANCELS in the bound; does NOT obstruct.
  - L3 Q_curv (curvature-scale, coeff of surviving |log|): OBSTRUCTS on type-D,
    VANISHES conformally-flat.
Refuter (i) attacks the first and misses; the genuine obstruction is the second

  untouched. Overall massless-Maxwell E2 residual keeps run-36 status (L2/L4

=== THE DELIVERABLE: a TWO-TIER answer (sharper than run-36) ===
The massless replacement SPLITS into two functionals of the SAME modular Hamiltonian K:

  TIER-1 (modular ENERGY) -- THE DELIVERABLE, EXISTS massless:
     <K>_A - <K>_0 = 2pi INT_{B_R} (R^2-r^2)/(2R) (<T00>_A - <T00>_0) d^3x
                   = 2pi INT_Sigma x^1 (<T00>_A - <T00>_0)   [wedge]
     Finite, mass-INDEPENDENT, IR-finite, anomaly-free IN THE DIFFERENCE.
     Grade: THEOREM modulo in-print (CHM 1102.0440 + run-37 first law).

  TIER-2 (literal eq:E2-CS coth/HS trace-norm) -- OBSTRUCTED massless:
     tr|i coth(K_d/2) - i coth(K_0/2)|, ||cosh^-1(K/2)||_HS^2 are a STRICTLY STRONGER,
     softer-weighted functional. For the soft-photon occupation delta(Omega)~1/Omega
     the coth-trace integrand ~ 1/Omega^2 is DOUBLY IR-DIVERGENT. The 1/m is the mass-gap
     SOFT CUTOFF of this divergence, NOT a pure inf_k=m artifact.
     Grade: OBSTRUCTED / NAMED-OPEN.

=== THE OVERCLAIM CORRECTION (#45, home (a): "conformal structure asserted exact") ===
run-36 (ISSUES l.9522, l.9580) framed the 1/m as "purely a spectral-gap artifact of
inf_k sqrt(k^2+m^2)=m". VERDICT: TOO OPTIMISTIC for the LITERAL coth-trace. It is correct
ONLY for the modular-ENERGY functional (TIER-1). For the coth-trace (the object eq:E2-CS
literally bounds), the 1/m regulates a GENUINE soft-IR divergence (delta~1/Omega =>
integrand ~1/Omega^2). SHARPENED, not overturned: the CFT rescue is REAL but delivers the
modular-ENERGY bound, NOT the coth-trace. [The distinction the earlier framing missed:
<K> weights soft modes by +Omega (kills 1/Omega, IR-finite); coth(pi Omega) weights them
by 1/Omega (doubles softness). Same K, DIFFERENT functionals -- verified sympy + numerics.]

  gap = inf_k sqrt(k^2+m^2) = m (sympy); 8E_delta/m -> oo as m->0 at fixed E_delta.
  E_delta -> 1.03047 (finite massless boost energy) at fixed packet as m->0: 1/m does NOT cancel.

  coth-trace cut at gap=m gives value*m -> const ~ 0.05: the 1/m IS the soft cutoff (BLOCK 8).

  HONEST REACH TABLE (TIER-1 massless modular-ENERGY bound):

--- HOME (a): trace anomaly + is the CFT modular structure exact or anomaly-corrected? ---
CONFIRMED at full grade. THREE distinct objects, kept distinct:
  (1) modular AUTOMORPHISM sigma_t (Tomita-Takesaki, BW geometric boost): an
      automorphism CANNOT carry a c-number (maps operators->operators). EXACT at
      one loop and beyond for the free CFT. [Refuter concedes: ledger l.314.]
  (2) modular Hamiltonian K = 2pi int x^1 T_00 as an OPERATOR: built from the
      T_00 COMPONENT; the anomaly <T^mu_mu>=c-number affects only the TRACE
      EXPECTATION, operator conservation exact (Moretti Thm3.2c, tex l.7144;
      "anomaly affects the trace only; conservation is exact", tex l.7157). K
      acquires NO operator c-number. FLPW l.13-14,217: modular-H (shape-deriv) =
      integral of the stress-tensor OPERATOR, no additive c-number. EXACT.
  (3) the state EXPECTATION <K>_omega carries a state-INDEPENDENT c-number
      curvature piece; EVERY E2 consumer is a DIFFERENCE <K>_wd - <K>_w0 in which
      it CANCELS identically (free U(1) beta=0 => exact). Matches tex l.19369-77
      (anomaly a separate additive c-number A^even_grav in the Clausius identity).
  => "exact vs anomaly-corrected" ANSWER: the modular STRUCTURE (automorphism + K
     operator) is EXACT; only the state expectation carries an anomaly c-number,
     which cancels in the bound. The anomaly does NOT reintroduce a mass scale
     into the BOUND. REFUTER CLAUSE (i) as "the anomaly is a mass-like scale" =
     REFUTED. Arms' A3.a = CONFIRMED (THEOREM-grade structural). Maxwell
     a=31/180, c=1/10, a/c=31/18 independently reproduced (Fraction check).
  RESIDUAL PRECISION (the refuter's true, narrower point, NOT a contradiction):
     the exactly-known CLOSED-FORM Casini-Huerta LOCAL weight for a bulk ball
     rests on the diamond->Rindler conformal map (type O only). That is object (2')
     the LOCAL WEIGHT, distinct from (2) the abstract K. See home (b).

--- HOME (a') the 1/m: TIER-1/TIER-2 split — the run-36->run-38 CORRECTION UPHELD ---
CONFIRMED at full grade; run-36's "pure spectral-gap artifact" framing was TOO
OPTIMISTIC for the coth-TRACE and is CORRECTED (not overturned) by run-38.
  * TIER-1 (modular ENERGY): Longo Thm 5.4 (PRIMARY, l.534-537):
      S_rel = pi int x^1 [h^2 + m^2 k^2 + |grad k|^2]. The mass enters ONLY as
      +m^2 k^2, which DROPS at m=0 -> massless energy pi int x^1[h^2+|grad k|^2],

      value converges to 10 as Omega_min->0. run-36 RIGHT for the energy.
  * TIER-2 (coth-TRACE, the eq:E2-CS LITERAL object): Chialastri-Sanders
      (PRIMARY, cs_2506.txt l.29-33): ||1/cosh(K/2)||^2_HS <= E/(8m). Their OWN
      massless obstruction (l.1655-68): for the massless field K_0 has spectrum R
      (BW boost), so R_0 = -i tanh(K_0/2) has spectrum [-1,1] and
      R_0^{-1} = i coth(K_0/2) is UNBOUNDED => "some of our general estimates from
      Section 3 no longer apply." This is EXACTLY eq:E2-CS's coth object failing
      at m=0. My adj38_tier_indep.py: coth-trace integrand ~1/Omega^2, value
      DIVERGES like 1/Omega_min. The 8E/m is the mass-gap (Omega_min~m) SOFT
      CUTOFF of a GENUINE divergence, NOT a pure inf_k sqrt(k^2+m^2)=m artifact.
  => The DECISIVE nuance: the SAME gaplessness that makes the ENERGY finite
     (soft modes weighted +Omega) makes the COTH object UNBOUNDED (spectrum of K
     reaches 0 => coth~2/K blows up). run-38 A1's TIER split is CONFIRMED and is a
     genuine SHARPENING of run-36. L2 stays NAMED-OPEN: the massless replacement
     for the eq:E2-CS coth-trace is genuinely missing (not a mere artifact removal).

--- HOME (b): background conformal classes / the |log| off the conf-flat locus ---
CONFIRMED at full grade (my adj38_L3_indep.py, symbolic, independent):
  * Seam (ml)^2|log(ml)|(1/2 + Q_curv/m^2): gap piece ->0 (power beats log);
    curv piece l^2 Q_curv|log(ml)| -> +oo for Q_curv>0 (power CANCELS, LOG
    SURVIVES); ==0 identically at Q_curv=0. Sympy limits: 0, oo, 0. The naive
    "power cancels so rescued" is HALF-TRUE (power yes, log no).
  * Q_curv=0 <=> conformally flat (Weyl=0). Schwarzschild: Ricci=0 but
    Kretschmann=Weyl^2=48 G^2M^2/r^6 != 0 (independently written), Petrov D,
    NOT conformally flat. Kerr likewise D. => |log| GENUINELY OBSTRUCTS there.
  * The rescue tracks the WEYL class, NOT flatness: dS/FRW are curved (R!=0) yet
    RESCUED (Weyl=0, type O). Refuter's "flat-space artifact" label OVERREACHES
    (dS/FRW curved-yet-rescued); the honest statement is "conformally-flat/type-O
    locus." Arms already made this correction (ledger l.209-210, l.263-265).
  ARMS-vs-REFUTER TENSION RESOLVED: three objects were being conflated in
  "does it hold on Schwarzschild":
    (i)   abstract first law dS_rel=delta<K_horizon> on the HORIZON wedge:
          needs a bifurcate KILLING horizon (Kay-Wald/Sewell: HH modular flow =
          Killing flow; web-verified primary), which Schwarzschild/Kerr HAVE.
          MASS-INDEPENDENT, conformal-flatness NOT needed. TIER-1 HOLDS on
          Schw/Kerr HORIZONS (arms A1 refinement, ledger l.470-476). SOUND.
    (ii)  closed-form LOCAL weight w=(R^2-r^2)/2R for a BULK ball: diamond->Rindler
          conformal map, type-O only. FAILS on Petrov-D bulk balls. (refuter kill ii)
    (iii) the L3 massive->massless SEAM |log|: Q_curv~Weyl^2 survives on Petrov D.
          OBSTRUCTS the CS-FORM (coth) bound's approach on Schw/Kerr. (refuter kill ii)
  => Refuter's "kill (ii)" lands on objects (ii)+(iii) [the LOCAL weight and the
     CS-form seam], NOT on object (i) [the abstract horizon energy first law].
     The arms already concede (ii)+(iii) in the honest map (L3 PARTIAL, CS-form
     type-O only). So the refuter SHARPENS but does not KILL anything the arms
     claim: the arms' delivered TIER-1 is the abstract horizon energy (holds on
     Schw/Kerr horizons); the CS-form coth-trace (TIER-2) they ALREADY grade
     obstructed on all backgrounds. NO net contradiction; NO clean kill of a
     standing arm claim.

--- HOME (c): conformal QNEC/ANEC vs conditioned-source QEI strength gap ---
CONFIRMED at full grade = HARD GAP (both A2-qnec arm and refuter concur; I concur).
  * CF 1812.04683 (PRIMARY, l.1,54-78): QNEC/ANEC is a bound on the NULL energy
    density T_kk, NULL-line-averaged along the Rindler horizon, from rel-entropy

  * eq:E2-QEI (tex l.17346): TIMELIKE-TIMELIKE (t^mu t^nu), SPACETIME-SMEARED
    (F^2 compact open ball), CONDITIONED-SOURCE floor C_S(<T>+c_S). Differs on
    >=3 independent axes: contraction (tt vs kk), support (ball vs null line),
    form (conditioned-source floor absent from ANEC). ANEC int T_kk>=0 does NOT
    lower-bound the ball-smeared int T_tt.
  * Corroborated by the PAPER'S OWN routing (tex l.17363-83): the free massless
    scalar in d=4 has provably NO state-independent null-averaged bound
    [FewsterRoman2003]; the null leg is routed through rel-entropy monotonicity
    (Ceyhan-Faulkner/Hollands-Longo) "not through a QEI." AND the QEI paper's own
    author (Sanders2024, sanders.txt l.669-671) flags Thm 3.1 as m>0 (Wick-square)
    and Thm 4.2 as 1+1d-specific -> no 4d massless Maxwell QEI in print.
  => REFUTER CLAUSE (iii) STANDS; L4 HARD GAP UNCHANGED. Arms A2 = CONFIRMED.

--- OVERALL ADJUDICATION ---
Each of the three homes CONFIRMED per piece at full grade:
  (a) anomaly: modular structure EXACT (automorphism + K operator); anomaly a
      state-indep c-number in the EXPECTATION, cancels in the bound; does NOT
      reintroduce a mass scale. Refuter (i) [anomaly=mass-scale] REFUTED.
  (a') 1/m: TIER-1 energy finite massless (Longo, no 1/m); TIER-2 coth-trace

      a REAL divergence. run-36 "pure artifact" CORRECTED. L2 NAMED-OPEN.
  (b) |log|: survives off the type-O (Weyl=0) locus; obstructs on Schw/Kerr
      (Petrov D). Tracks the Weyl class not flatness. Abstract horizon TIER-1
      energy first law HOLDS on Schw/Kerr horizons (Kay-Wald); the CS-form
      coth-trace + local-weight FAIL there. L3 PARTIAL.
  (c) QNEC/ANEC strictly weaker than the conditioned-source ball-uniform QEI on
      >=3 axes. L4 HARD GAP.
ARMS-vs-REFUTER: the "two clean kills" of the refuter land on objects the arms
have ALREADY conceded in the honest map (CS-form coth-trace obstructed massless;
local weight + seam type-O only). The refuter SHARPENS the reach; it does not
overturn a STANDING arm deliverable. The one delivered positive (TIER-1 abstract

Schw/Kerr horizons) SURVIVES both kills (it is not the coth-trace and not the
local weight). The run-38 THESIS as literally stated ("the conformal structure
CLOSES the massless-Maxwell hard half") is CORRECTLY REFUTED for the curved
physical backgrounds by BOTH arms and refuter; the honest residual is UNCHANGED
IN KIND (L2 named-open, L4 hard gap, L3 partial), SHARPENED in statement.

CONCORDANCE WITH THE PAPER (l.17705-17707, the just-upgraded E2b bullet): the
paper ALREADY states "the 1/m is a spectral-gap artifact, conformally softened to
a |log(m l)| only on the conformally-flat locus." My adjudication REFINES the

## RUN 38 — FINAL ADJUDICATION (adjudicator, imports NO arm code; adj38_final_indep.py, 14/14 PASS)

(run 38, 2026-07-11, Opus 4.8. Read unification.tex eq:E2-QEI l.17346-51, eq:E2-CS
l.17397-403, lem:E2-energy-lipschitz l.17414-56, anomaly l.7150-57, null-leg l.17363-83,
E2b bullet l.17698-708; ISSUES.md run-36 A2 l.9500-9700. Reproduced from scratch
[adj38_final_indep.py, 14/14 PASS, sympy+numpy, no fitted factors]: the TIER-1/TIER-2
split, the L3 |log| survival, the Maxwell a/c ratio. Primary-verified Longo 1901.02366
Thm 5.4 at l.56 of Longo_1901.txt. Re-ran all four arm scripts [modenergy/anomaly/qnec/
refute all EXIT=0].)

### THE VERDICT — the massless axis is REDUCED-to-named on the energy leg, WALLED off type-O

**L2 (modular energy) — TIER-1 DELIVERED massless / TIER-2 OBSTRUCTED; NET NAMED-OPEN.**
The split is CONFIRMED and it CORRECTS run-36's "pure spectral-gap artifact" framing.
TIER-1 (modular ENERGY, Longo Thm 5.4 S=pi INT x1[h^2 + m^2 k^2 + |grad k|^2], primary-
verified l.56): the mass sits ONLY in +m^2 k^2, drops at m=0, leaving a finite IR-safe
massless energy — NO 1/m (my numerics converge to 10.87 as m->0). TIER-2 (eq:E2-CS literal
coth-trace tr|i coth(K_d/2)-i coth(K_0/2)|): GENUINELY IR-divergent massless — coth(Om/2)
~2/Om near the spectral bottom (verified series), Om^2 d/dOm coth = -2 (integrand ~1/Om^2),
and INT_{Om_min}^1 dOm/Om^2 ~ 1/Om_min (ratio 0.999). So the 1/m in eq:E2-CS is the
MASS-GAP SOFT CUTOFF of a REAL soft-IR divergence, NOT a pure inf_k=m artifact. The
paper's lem:E2-energy-lipschitz (l.17454) literally consumes the TIER-2 coth-trace with the
1/m; whether the S7 transport step can be re-routed through the weaker TIER-1 energy
continuity is a proof re-derivation NOT attempted here => L2 STAYS NAMED-OPEN, sharpened
(the energy replacement exists massless; the coth-trace does not; the chain-dependency is
the residual). Grade: PARTIAL / REDUCED (obstruction reclassified from "IR singularity" to
"missing 3+1d Maxwell coth-trace estimate + is the coth-trace even needed").

**L3 (conformal weight) — PARTIAL, tracks the WEYL class not flatness.** E_seam ~
(ml)^2|log(ml)|(1/2 + Q_curv/m^2): gap piece (ml)^2*(1/2)*|log| -> 0 (power beats log,
verified); curv piece l^2 Q_curv |log(ml)| -> +oo for Q_curv>0 (verified, == |log m| at
l=Q=1); VANISHES at Q_curv=0 (verified). Q_curv=0 <=> Weyl=0 <=> Petrov-O. RESCUED:
Minkowski, de Sitter, FRW, interior-Schwarzschild (Weyl=0 though R!=0 for dS/FRW).
OBSTRUCTED: Schwarzschild-ext, Kerr, Kerr-(A)dS (Weyl^2=48G^2M^2/r^6!=0, Petrov-D,
verified). Rescue tracks the WEYL class, NOT flatness — the honest reach.

**L4 (QEI) — HARD GAP, clean kill (iii).** Direct comparison of operator forms (both read
from source): eq:E2-QEI (l.17346) is T^ren[t^mu t^nu F^2] = timelike-timelike, spacetime-
smeared (F compact, F=1 on supp f = ball-uniform conditioned-source floor). Conformal
QNEC/ANEC (FLPW, Ceyhan-Faulkner) is INT T_kk = null-null, null-line-averaged. Differ on
>=3 axes; ANEC does not lower-bound the ball-smeared T_tt. The paper ALREADY routes the
null leg through rel-entropy monotonicity (l.17363-83), NOT a QEI. L4 unchanged.

**ANOMALY (refuter i) — MISSES for the bound.** Maxwell a=31/180, c=1/10, a/c=31/18
(verified; the mm_anomaly.py comment "c=108/360=3/10" at l.33/37 is a CONFIRMED cosmetic
annotation slip — 108/360=3/10 contradicts the load-bearing c_ph=1/10=36/360 assigned at
l.35 and used in tex l.321; scratchpad-only, non-load-bearing, NO grade change, fix on any
future write-in). The anomaly is a STATE-INDEPENDENT c-number ("affects the trace only;
conservation is exact", tex l.7157 verbatim), absent from the modular automorphism (BW
boost) and from K=2pi INT x^1 T00 (FLPW); it CANCELS in every E2 consumer (each a state-
difference on a fixed background; free U(1) beta=0 exact). It enters the EXPECTATION, NOT
the BOUND. The refuter's central error (correctly identified by arms A1/A3): the anomaly
(curvature^2 in <T>) and the L3 coefficient Q_curv (curvature-scale in the bound) are
DIFFERENT objects — clause (i) attacks the wrong one.

### THE REACH (which backgrounds)
- CONFORMAL RESCUE WORKS (Petrov-O, Weyl=0): Minkowski, de Sitter, FRW, interior-
  Schwarzschild. TIER-1 massless modular-energy bound + L3 rescue complete.
- CONFORMAL RESCUE OBSTRUCTS (Petrov-D, Weyl!=0): Schwarzschild-ext, Kerr, Kerr-(A)dS.
  The closed-form CHM local weight fails (diamond->Rindler map is conf-flat-only) and the
  L3 |log(ml)| survives. NOTE: the ABSTRACT TIER-1 horizon modular-energy first law still
  holds on Schw/Kerr horizons via Kay-Wald (HH modular flow = Killing flow, needs a
  bifurcate Killing horizon not conformal flatness) — only the closed-form local weight and
  the coth-seam are type-O-only.

### THE MAP (closed / reduced / walled)
- The massless axis is NOT CLOSED and NOT fully WALLED. It is a THREE-PART verdict:
  * L2-energy (TIER-1): REDUCED-to-named-external-math (Longo scalar Thm 5.4 + run-37
    Maxwell first-law instance at the formal-pAQFT ceiling); the massless energy EXISTS.
  * L2-cothtrace (TIER-2) + L4: WALLED for the literal eq:E2-CS/eq:E2-QEI forms — genuine
    strength/IR gaps, no conformal object supplies them (kill iii; the coth-trace is
    IR-divergent massless). Off type-O, L3 also walls (the |log|).
  * The residual is a CHAIN-DEPENDENCY question (does S7 need TIER-2 or can it re-route to
    TIER-1?) + the missing 3+1d Maxwell instances — named-open, writable, no operator
    obstruction identified.

### E2b MEANING (author-gated, DESCRIBED)
E2b already names both residuals (l.17700-708) with the 1/m spectral-gap + |log(ml)|
conf-flat caveat. This run SHARPENS without changing any grade: (i) the 1/m splits — the
modular ENERGY has none (massless, IR-finite), the coth-trace eq:E2-CS genuinely does
(soft-IR divergence, 1/m = its cutoff); (ii) the conformal reach is the WEYL/Petrov-O class
(dS/FRW rescued though curved; Schw/Kerr walled); (iii) the anomaly is invisible to the
bound (state-independent c-number, cancels in the difference). An author-gated micro-edit
COULD note that the E2b "1/m spectral-gap artifact" wording is precise for the energy
functional but that the coth-trace it is attached to is itself IR-divergent massless (so the
softening is TIER-1-only). NON-load-bearing sharpening of an already-named-open residual,
NOT a (*) claim.
